12.3: Cho girhumire ngasi byooshi mwaderhere omu mwizimya nji byayunviikana ezuuba lyakola. Echi mwabohereeze omu gurhwi ebusiika, nji chayaamagazizwa oku nju elugulu.
12.4: «Mwe beera baani, mbabwirire byo: murhayuubahaga abantu bayirha omubiri, na nta chindi bakanachigala kujira enyuma z'aho.
12.5: Nkola nabayeereka nde mukwaneene kuyuubaha. Muyuubahe Nnamahanga, yegwerhe obuhashe b'okuyirha n'ogukabula omu hantu h'amalibuko manene. Neechi, mbabwirire byo, oyoola yi muhemerwe kuyuubaha.
12.6: Ka barhaguza nyunyi erhaano z'ebishwa oku bicheri bibiri? Aliko, chiro nta nguma omu zo eyibiriirwe na Nnamahanga.
12.7: N'enviiri z'amarhwe menyu zooshi ziganjirwe. Leero, murhayuubahaga chiro; mugwerhe akamaro kanene kulusha ebishwa binene.» Okuyemeera changwa okulahira Yeesu
12.8: «Mbabwirire byo: ngasi yeeshi nji wanyemeera embere z'abantu, Mwene oMuntu naye nj'amuyemeera embere za bamalahika ba Nnamahanga.
12.9: Aliko, ola nji wandahira embere z'abantu, naye nj'alahirwa embere za bamalahika ba Nnamahanga.
12.10: «Na ngasi yeeshi nji waderhera kubi Mwene oMuntu nj'ababalirwa, aliko ola nji wadukanga Muuka-Mutagatiifu arhakababalirwa.
12.11: «Hano nji babakululira omu masinagoogi, abarhwali n'abarhegesi, murhayuubahiraga obulyo nji mwabuurana, changwa bichi nji mwaderha.
12.12: Bulaala Muuka-Mutagatiifu nj'abayigiriza ho n'aho bichi mukwaneene kuderha.» Omugani g'omuchire muhwinja
12.13: Muntu muguma mw'abo bantu banene abwira Yeesu ntya: «Mwigiriza, bwira mwene weerhu ampe echaani chigabi ch'omwandu gwerhu.»
12.14: Yeesu amushubiza ntya: «Muza wee, nde wanjiraga muzuuzi changwa muntu w'okubagabira omwandu gwenyu?»
12.15: Ashuba kubabwira ntya: «Muchilange n'okugwarha amahugu ma ngasi buuko, kwenge akalamo k'omuntu garharhengeere omu kanji k'ebikulo byaage.»
12.16: Yeesu ababwira ogu mugani: «Eshwa ly'omugale muguma lyayeeza bweneene.
12.17: Alema akengeera n'oguchiibaza ntya: ‹Bichi njirage? Bulaala ntagwerhe hantu hanene h'ogushaluulira emyaaka yaani.›
12.18: Aderha ntya: ‹Tala oku naajira: nashanda enguli zaani, nayumbaka ezigalihire; nji nalundira mo amahemba maani n'ebindi bikulo.›
12.19: N'enyuma z'aho, nji nachibwira ntya omu murhima: ‹Ngwerhe ebintu binene bweneene bibiikirwe, bya myaaka minene; nahumuuka, naalya, nanywa, naashagaluka.›
12.20: Aliko Nnamahanga amubwira ntya: ‹Oli muhwinja! M'obu budufu waafa! Ka warheganyize nde nji waaba nyina ebi bintu byooshi wachibikiire?›»
12.21: Yeesu ashuba kuderha ntya: «Ntyo ku bibeera omuntu ochihakira ebikulo byaage yenyine, aliko eyi arhali mugale embere za Nnamahanga.» Oguchilangalira Nnamahanga Matayo 6.25-34
12.22: Yeesu ashubi bwira abigirizwa baage ntya: «Mulolage egirhumire mbabwira oku murhachiganyaga elugulu w'akalamo kenyu, akaba bichi mwalya; changwa elugulu w'omubiri gwenyu, akaba bichi mwayambala.
12.23: Bulaala akalamo kali ka bulagiirire kulusha ebiryo, n'omubiri guli gwabulagiirire kulusha emyambalo.
12.24: Mulole ebihungwe: birhahinga birhanashaluula, birhajira aha bibiikira changwa enguli. Aliko Nnamahanga yebiliisa! Mwabo muli b'akamaro kanene kulusha enyunyi!
12.25: Nde omu mwabo omu guchiiganya, wakagala kuleehya chiro bugeeke akalamo kaage?
12.26: Akaba ntaacho mwagachigalira mw'ebi bintu bigeeke, gichi chagarhuma mwachilunza oku bisigeere?
12.27: Mulole guurhe ebirhi biyaasa: birhakola, birhaluka fulema; aliko, mbabwire oku chiro mwami Solomoono omu bukuuze bwage arhayambalaga nka chiguma omu byo.
12.28: Akaba Nnamahanga ayambisa ntya egirhi chiri omu shwa zeene n'omuseezi banagiheba omu chibeeye, bichi byaagarhuma arhabayambisa nenyu kulusha, mwe bantu b'obwemeezi bugeeke!
12.29: Nenyu, murhagendaga mwashonda gichi mwalya changwa gichi mwanywa, murhanachibuliisaga omurhuula.
12.30: Ebyo byooshi by'abapagaani ba lino gulu bashonda buzira kuluha. Yisho wenyu ayinji oku mubikeneere.
12.31: Ahuubwe, murhange mushonde obwime bwa Nnamahanga, n'ebyoola bindi naye nj'abaheereza byo.
12.32: Murhayuubahaga, mwe buso bugeeke; kwenge byasimiisize Yisho okubaha oBwami bwage.» Ebikulo omu mpingu Matayo 6.19-21
12.33: Yeesu ashuba kuderha ntya: «Muguze ebintu byenyu, muhe abakene efuranga. Muchijirire orhushaho rhw'efuranga rhurhagashaaja, muchibiikire ebikulo birhaagahwa omu mpingu. Eyoola nta mwizi wakayegeera yo na nta mushwa gwakabibiihya.
12.34: Bulaala emunda ebikulo byaawe biri, yi n'omurhima gwawe gwaba guli.» Omugani g'okuneeka
12.35: Yeesu ashuba kuderha ntya: «Muchirheganye, mube muyambeere emyambalo y'akaasi n'amatara machaanirwe.
12.36: Nenyu mube kuguma n'aba bantu bali balinga nnahamwabo agaluke gurhenga oku buhya, hano akongoorha oku lunvi bagale kumuchinguulira jubaajuba.
12.37: Bagishirwe aba bagaragu nnahamwabo ashimaana bataramire ey'agaluka! Okuli, mbabwirire, naye nj'ayambala emyambalo y'akaasi, nj'abayikaza n'okuyinja kubaha ebiryo.
12.38: Nk'ayinjire omu budufu ahagarhi changwa buyerekeera gucha, akanababugaana bagitaramire, bagishirwe!» Matayo 24.43-51
12.39: «Mumenye bwinja: nyina enju nk'amenyaga aha saa zinga egishambo chigwasize kuyinja, arhakalekere enju yaage eshandwe.
12.40: Nenyu leero muchirheganye, bulaala Mwene oMuntu nj'ayinja omu saa murhaganiizize.»
12.41: Petero abaza Yeesu ntya: «Nnaweerhu, ka rhwewe rh'obwirire ogu mugani changwa abantu booshi?»
12.42: Nnaweerhu ashubiza ntya: «Nde ye mukozi orhahemuka, na munya bwenge, eyi nnahamwabo akajira mwimangizi w'abandi bakozi baage, y'abaheereza ebiryo omu gashanji gahemerwe?
12.43: Agishirwe oyu muja, akaba nnahamwabo hano agaluka, amushimaana ali akola ntyo!
12.44: Okuli mbabwirire: nnahamwabo nj'amujira mwimangizi w'ebikulo byaage byooshi.
12.45: Aliko, nk'oyo muja achibwirire ntya omu murhima gwage: ‹Nnahamwerhu alegamire kuyinja›, agarhondera gukubirha abaabo baja b'abalume n'aba bakazi, agarhondera kulya, kunywa n'okulaluka,
12.46: nnahamwabo nj'agaluka olusiku oyo muja arhalikengereere, n'esa arhamenyere. Nj'amuhana bweneene n'okumuyikaza haguma n'abahemusi.
12.47: «Omuja nji waaba amenyere ogushonda kwa nnahamwabo, aliko arharheganyaga n'okujira echintu chiyerekeere oko gushonda, nj'ashuurhwa enkoni zirhankaganjwa.
12.48: Sy'aliko, ola orhamenyaga ogushonda kwa nnahamwabo, n'okuba ajirire ebintu bikwaneene obuhane nj'ashuurhwa nkoni zigeeke. Eyi baheere bintu binene, nji baamubaza binene; eyi babikiisize binene, nji bamuhema binene kulusha.» Yeesu, empanvu y'entambala
12.49: «Nayinjaga guhira omuliro oku gulu; nagashondere gube gwachaanirwe!
12.50: Nkwaneene kubatiizwa omu malibuko; n'omurhima gwani gurhaviire gwarhuleera kugera birhaza kujirika.» Matayo 10.34-36
12.51: «Ka muganiizize oku nayinjaga kuleerha omurhuula oku gulu? Nangwa, mbabwire okuli, sy'aliko obuhaka.
12.52: Gurhenga bunoola, bantu barhaano balamire omu nju nguma barhakayunviikana, basharhu nji balwisa babiri, na babiri nji balwisa basharhu.
12.53: Omwana n'eshe barhakayunviikana, omunyere na nyina barhakayunviikana, omwazaana na nazaala barhakayunviikana.» Okumenya ebihe
12.54: Yeesu ashuba kubwira olubaga lw'abantu ntya: «Eyi mwabona ebichu byahulukira ebuzikiro bw'ezuuba, ho n'aho mwanaderha: ‹Envula yayinjire›, ebyoola byanahika.
12.55: Na nk'omuyaga gw'egarhongo guli kugera, mwanaderha: ‹Echuuka chaaba.› Ebyoola byanahika.
12.56: Mwe ndyaalya! Muyinji kumenya oboorhere bw'egulu n'echaalege. Gurhe mwagafundwa kumenya amango mali bunoola?» Okuyunvikana n'mushombanyi Matayo 5.25-26
12.58: Nka waaja kubuurana n'ogusidaakire embere z'omurhegesi, ochihangaane oyunviikane naye omu njira; y'arhaguheeka embere z'omuzuuzi. Omuzuuzi naye akaguhaana omu maboko m'omupoolisi, n'oyo mupoolisi anaguhira omu munyororo.
12.59: Okuli nkubwirire, orhagarhenga omu munyororo orhanahongere olufuranga lw'obuzinda omu zibaguchiire.»

13.1: Amo mango, abantu baguma bayinja kubalira Yeesu gurhe Pilaato ayirhaga aBagalilaaya baguma eyi bali gurhuula entuulo emwa Nnamahanga.
13.2: Yeesu ababwira ntya: «Mwabo muganiizize kw'abo Bagalilaaya bayirhwaga ntyo, k'okuderha oku bo baligwerhe ebyaaha binene kulusha abandi Bagalilaaya booshi?
13.3: Mbabwirire oku nangwa. Aliko nka murhalekere ebyaaha byenyu, mweshi nji mwafa kuguma nabo.
13.4: Changwa, aboola bantu ekumi na munaane omunaara gw'eSilowaamu gwarhogeraga ko, gwanabayirha, muganiizize oku boowe bo baliiri babi bweneene kulusha abandi Banyayerusaleema booshi?
13.5: Mbabwirire oku nanga. Nenyu nka murhalekere ebyaaha byenyu, mweshi nji mwafa kuguma nabo.» Omugani g'omurhi gurhayaanaga malehe
13.6: Yeesu ashuba kubabwira guno mugani: «Haliiri muntu muguma waligwerhe omurhi guyirikwa tiini omu shwa lyaage ly'emizabiibu. Aja oku go gushonda amalehe, aliko ntaamo abwene.
13.7: Ava abwira omuhinzi w'elyo shwa ntya: ‹Lola! Myaaka esharhu eyi ndi nayinja gushonda amalehe k'oguula murhi eyi ntanamabona. Oguche! Chagarhuma gwabeera bushaabusha omu budaka?›
13.8: Aliko oyo muhinzi anamushubiza ntya: ‹Nnaweerhu, oguleke kandi guno mwaka, mpingire go n'okuguhira kw'emyaavu.
13.9: Ntyo, nkabaga nji gwaleerha amalehe omu mwaka gwayinjire, akaba birhabeere ntyo, wanagucha!›» Yeesu afumya omukazi olusiku lw'eSaabato
13.10: Lusiku luguma lw'eSaabato, Yeesu aliiri kuyigiriza omu sinagoogi.
13.11: Ahoola haliiri omukazi olwere. Gurhengera myaaka ekumi na munaane, omuzimu alimuyinamize. Arhakagalire chiro kuyinamuka.
13.12: Yeesu abeere amubona, amuhamagala n'okumubwira ntya: «Nyaama wee, endwala yawe yafumire!»
13.13: Amuhira ko amaboko, ho n'aho ayinamuka n'okuva arhondera gukuuza Nnamahanga.
13.14: Aliko omukulu w'esinagoogi agaya oku Yeesu afumyize omuntu olusiku lw'eSaabato. Ava abwira echigusho ch'abantu ntya: «Hali siku ndarhu z'ogukola mo akaasi; mw'ezoola siku zimulemage mwayinja mo guchifumiisa, sy'aliko nangwa olusiku lw'eSaabato!»
13.15: Nnaweerhu amushubiza ntya: «Mwe ndyaalya mwe! Nkaasi muguma wenyu ashwekuula enka yaage changwa epunda yaage n'okuyiheeka gushooka olusiku lw'eSaabato, k'arhali ntyo?
13.16: N'oyuula mukazi w'obuuko bwa Abrahaamu owalizirikirwe na Shetaani myaaka ekumi na munaane, ka birhahemere ashwekuulwe mw'ebyo biziriko byaage olusiku lw'eSaabato?»
13.17: Yeesu abeere ali kuderha ntyo, booshi baliiri kumulwisa bayunva eshonyi; aliko echigusho chooshi ch'abantu chamogera ebijiro binja byooshi aliiri kujira. Ogushushanya oBwami bwa Nnamahanga Matayo 13.31-33; Mariko 4.30-32
13.18: Yeesu ashuba kuderha ntya: «oBwami bwa Nnamahanga bwagashusha na gichi? Nankabushushanya na gichi?
13.19: Bushusheene n'ehiburho hy'eharadaali muntu muguma arhoolaga anahibyaala omu shwa lyaage. Hyaamera n'ogukula, hyaaba murhi, n'enyunyi z'omu chaalege zayumbaka ebyoogo byaazo omu marhabi maago.»
13.20: Yeesu ashuba kuderha ntya: «Gichi nankalinganya n'oBwami bwa Nnamahanga?
13.21: Bulinganeene n'echachu omukazi arhoolaga n'okuyihira omu milengo esharhu y'eshaano y'ogukola emigati, kugera egihe yooshi yarhunda.» Omulyango gufundereere
13.22: Yeesu aliiri omu njira aja eYerusaleema, alenga omu bishagala bineneenene n'ebigeekegeeke ayigiriza.
13.23: Muntu muguma amubaza ntya: «Nnaweerhu, k'arhali bantu bageeke bonyine nji bachungulwa?» Yeesu ashubiza ntya:
13.24: «Muchihangaane kuja omu Bwami bwa Nnamahanga kugerera omu mulyango gufundereere. Bulaala, yi nababwira, bantu banene nji bashonda kuja mo aliko barhakagala.
13.25: Amango nyina enju nj'aba ayimangire ey'amanachinga omulyango, nji mwaba mwamasigala embuga. Nji mwarhondera gukongoorha oku mulyango n'okuderha ntya: ‹Nnaweerhu, orhuchinguulire.› Nj'abashubiza ntya: ‹Mwabo, ntenji muli ba ngahe.›
13.26: Ho n'aho, nji mwamubwira ntya: ‹Rhwaliire rhwananywa haguma naawe, wanagendaga wayigiriza emwerhu!›
13.27: Naye nj'ababwira ntya: ‹Ntenji muli ba ngahe. Muje hale naani, mweshi mwe mukola amabi!›
13.28: Eyoola nji yaaba amalira n'oguhekenya amenyo , amo mango nji mwabona Abrahaamu, Isaka na Yakobo, n'abaleebi booshi omu Bwami bwa Nnamahanga, aliko mwabo nji mwaba mwakabwirwe embuga!
13.29: Abantu nji barhengera ebuhulukiro bw'ezuuba n'ebuzikiro bwalyo, n'abandi gurhengera emalambo n'egarhongo n'okuyikala balye haguma omu Bwami bwa Nnamahanga.
13.30: Mumenye oku hali abazinda nji baaba barhanzi, hali n'abarhanzi nji baaba bazinda.» Yeesu alakira Yerusaleema
13.31: Mw'ebyoola bishanji, aBafarisaayo baguma bayegeera Yeesu n'okumubwira ntya: «Rhenga hano, ochigendere ahandi, bulaala Heroode yashonda gukuyirha.»
13.32: Yeesu abashubiza ntya: «Mugende mujibwira ogoola mutereri ntya: ‹Yi nalibisya abazimu n'ogufumya abalwala zeene n'omuseezi. Na lishinjo naamala akaasi kaani.›
13.33: Aliko bihemere ngendekere olugenzi lwani zeene, omuseezi na lishinjo, bulaala birhakwaneene kuyirhira omuleebi ahandi aharhali eYerusaleema.» Matayo 23.37-39
13.34: «Yerusaleema, Yerusaleema, wooyo weyirha abaleebi n'okubanda amabaale abantu Nnamahanga agurhumiraga! Kanga nashondaga guhira haguma abaana baawe nk'oku engoko ehira haguma ebyaanagoko byaayo omu byuubi byaayo! Aliko murhabilonzaga.
13.35: Mumenye okw'enju yenyu yaaba mushaka. Mbabwirire byo: murhagachimbona kugera amango hayinja egihe nji mwaderha ntya: ‹Nnamahanga agishe owayinja oku ziino lya Nnaweerhu!›»

14.1: Lusiku luguma lw'eSaabato, Yeesu aja kulya emwa muguma w'abakulu b'aBafarisaayo. Abaliiri ho booshi baliiri bamuloleereza.
14.2: Omuntu olwere endwala y'ogurhundiisa omubiri aliiri embere za Yeesu.
14.3: Yeesu abaza abigiriza b'amarhegeko n'aBafarisaayo ntya: «K'amarhegeko meerhu mayemereere changwa nangwa omuntu ogufumya omulwala olusiku lw'eSaabato?»
14.4: Aliko baasira. Yeesu ava arhoola oyo mulwala, amufumya n'okumuleka agende.
14.5: Ashuba kubabaza ntya: «Nde omu mwabo nk'omugala changwa enka yaage egarhogera omu gishimu, ka ho n'aho arhakayikuula mo nachiro luli lusiku lw'eSaabato?»
14.6: Baabula echi bamushubiza. Ochihirire elugulu nj'ayandagazwa
14.7: Yeesu abeere abona gurhe abalaalikirwe yi bachiishoga ebichumbi by'embere, abachiira ogu mugani:
14.8: «Nk'omuntu aguhamageere kuja kulya amango m'obuhya, orhajaaga kuyikala oku gichumbi ch'embere. Bulaala hali amango omuntu okengerwe gukulusha alaalikirwe,
14.9: owabalaalikaga wooyo n'owenyu akayinja gukubwira ntya: ‹Olekere oyuula muntu egichumbi.› Wanaja wagwarhwa n'eshoni z'okuja kuyikala oku gichumbi ch'enyuma.
14.10: Aliko, amango olaalikirwe, wanaja kuyikala oku gichumbi ch'enyuma, y'amango hano owakulaalikaga ayinja, akubwire ntya: ‹Mwira waani, oje kuyikala oku gichumbi ch'embere!› Ntyo, nji bwakubeera bukenge embere z'abantu booshi nji baaba bayikeere haguma naawe oku meeza.
14.11: Bulaala ngasi yeeshi ochizamwire nj'ayandagazwa, n'ochiyandageeze nj'azamuulwa.» Okulaalika abakene
14.12: Yeesu ashuba kubwira ola wamulaalikaga ntya: «Amango warheganyiza abantu ebiryo by'ezuuba changwa by'egolo, orhalaalikaga abeera baawe, changwa beene benyu, changwa abantu b'omulala gwawe, changwa abatuuranyi baawe b'abachire. Bulaala nabo nji bakayinja gukulaalika, na ntyo wanaba wamajuhwa.
14.13: Aliko amango wahamagala abantu kulya oku lusiku lukulu, olaalike abakeene, ebirema, abahunzize n'empumi.
14.14: Ntyo, nji waaba mugishwa, kwenge boowe barhagwerhe echi bagakujuha omu gukugalulira! Aliko, nji waajuhwa amango m'ogufuuka kw'abakwaneene.» Omugani gw'abantu barhenguhaga omulaali Matayo 22.1-14
14.15: Muntu muguma omu baliiri baalya haguma na Yeesu abeere ayunva ebyo binwa, aderha ntya: «Agishirwe ola nji waalya omu Bwami bwa Nnamahanga!»
14.16: Yeesu amushubiza ntya: «Haliiri muntu muguma warheganyaga biryo binene, analaalika bantu banene.
14.17: Egihe ch'okulya chagerere ho, arhuma omuja waage kubwira abalaalikirwe: ‹Muyinje, byooshi byarheganyizwe.›
14.18: Aliko booshi barhondera kuderha ngasi muguma echaarhuma arhabonekana. Omwambere amubwira ntya: ‹Nagulaga eshwa, bimpemere nje kulirhangula; nguhemere ombabalire.›
14.19: Owindi aderha ntya: ‹Nagulaga enka ekumi z'oguhingiisa, nguhemere ombabalire, naaja kulola akaba zaakola.›
14.20: Owindi aderha ntya: ‹Namayuusa gushaba, chocharhuma ntayinja!›
14.21: Oyo muja agaluka emwa nnahamwabo, amubalira ebyo byooshi. Nnahamwabo akaliha, abwira oyo omuja waage ntya: ‹Genda juba omu njira zineneenene n'omu zigekegeeke z'egishagala, oleerhe hano abakene, ebirema, empumi n'abahunzize.›
14.22: Omuja abeere amala kujira ntyo, aderha ntya: ‹Nnaweerhu, ebi wahemaga byajirirwe, aliko hanachiri ahakayikalwa!›
14.23: Nnahamwabo ava amubwira ntya: ‹Oje omu njira n'omu migenderano y'egishagala, oseeze abantu bayinje kuja omu nju, y'omu mwani muyunjula abantu.
14.24: Kwenge, mbabwirire byo, ntaaye mw'aba bantu bali balaalikirwe nji waalya oku biryo byaani.›» Obulyo bw'ogukulikira Yeesu Matayo 10.37-38
14.25: Lusiku luguma abantu banene baliiri kulambagira haguma na Yeesu omu njira. Ahindamuka n'okubabwira ntya:
14.26: «Nk'omuntu ankulikiire arhanansiimire kulusha eshe, nyina, mukaage, abaana baage, beene baabo, bali baabo, chiro n'akalamo kaage, arhaakaba mwigirizwa waani.
14.27: N'omuntu orhaheekere omusalaaba gwage n'okunkulikira, arhaakaba mwigirizwa waani.
14.28: «Nde omu mwabo, nk'ashondere kuyumbaka enju nene, arharhanga kuyikala aganje engulo y'ebyakoleesa n'okulola akaba agwerhe ebikulo by'okuyiyunjuza?
14.29: Kwenge, nk'arhondeere kuyumbaka n'akaba arhagalire kumala, aba nji baabona ntyo, nji bamushekera.
14.30: Baderha ntya: ‹Oyu muntu arhondeere kuyumbaka, aliko agambirwe kuyunjuza.›
14.31: Changwa mwami ohe, nk'ashondere kulwisa owindi mwami, orharhanga kuyikala n'oguchiibaza akaba oku misi y'abasoda baage bihumbi ekumi, akagala guhima oyo waabo oyinjire na basoda bihumbi makumyaabiri?
14.32: Akaba arhakagala, agarhumira oyo waabo abantu achiri hale b'okumubaza gurhe bakayunviikana n'omurhuula gube ho.
14.33: Nenyu ntyo kubinali! Ngasi yeeshi omu mwabo nk'arhalekere ebikulo byaage byooshi arhaakaba mwigirizwa waani.» Omunyu gurhachiri mw'obununu Matayo 5.13; Mariko 9.50
14.34: «Omunyu chiri chintu gikwiriire. Sy'aliko gugaheza obuloke, gurhe bakagugalulira bo?
14.35: Gurhachiri gwinja oku budaka changwa oku myaavu; banagukabula embuga. Ogwerhe amarhwi m'okuyunva, ayunve!»

15.1: Abafurhiisa b'amakooli n'abanyabyaaha baliiri kuyegeera Yeesu yi bamuyunviriza.
15.2: aBafarisaayo n'abigiriza b'amarhegeko babeere baabona ntyo, bamuveeba ntya: «Oyu muntu y'ayankirira abanyabyaaha n'okulya nabo!»
15.4: «Nde omu mwabo, nk'agwerhe ntaama egana, agaheza nguma omu zo, k'arhakaleka zila zindi makumi gali mwenda na mwenda omu mpinga y'aja gushonda ela eherere kugera amango ayibona?
15.5: N'akayibona, anayihira oku birhugo byaage n'obushagaluke bunene,
15.6: anagaluka emwage, anahamagala beera baage n'abatuuranyi baage n'okubabwira ntya: ‹Mushagaluke haguma naani, bulaala nabwene entaama yaani yali herere.›
15.7: Na ntyo mbabwirire byo, nji haaba obushagaluke bunene omu mpingu oku munyabyaaha muguma olekere ebyaaha byaage, ahaali h'abantu makumi gali mwenda na mwenda bakwaneene barhakeneere okuleka ebyaaha byaabo.» Omugani gw'egicheri chaheraga chanabonekana
15.8: Yeesu ashuba kuderha ntya: «Mukazi muchi, nk'agwerhe bicheri ekumi by'efuranga n'agaheza gicheri kiguma, k'arhagachaana etara, agahyaagira enju n'agashonda bwinjabwinja kugera amango achibona?
15.9: Na hano abona echo gicheri, anahamagala abeerakazi n'abatuuranyi baage n'okuderha ntya: ‹Mushagaluke haguma naani, bulaala nabwene egicheri chaani ch'efuranga nalihezeze!›
15.10: Mbabwirire byo oku ntyo ku bamalahika ba Nnamahanga banashagaluka nk'omunyabyaaha muguma alekere ebyaaha byaage.» Omugani g'omusole w'aliherere anashuba kubonekana
15.11: Yeesu ashuba kuderha ntya: «Haliiri muntu muguma waligwerhe bagala babiri.
15.12: Omudoorho abwira eshe ntya: ‹Daarha, ompe echaani chigabi ch'agashambala chikwaneene kuba chaani.› Eshe abagabira bombi.
15.13: Enyuma wa siku zigeeke, omugala mudoorho aguza omwandu gwage n'okugenda omu gihugo cha hale. Mw'echo gihugo ashandaguza ebikulo byaage omu boorhere bubi.
15.14: Amalire kubishandaguza byooshi, enzara nene yaba mw'echo gihugo, arhondera kubula ngasi chintu.
15.15: Aja agenda gukolera omuntu muguma w'echo gihugo. Oyo muntu amurhuma omu mashwa maage kulagira engulube.
15.16: Oyo murhabana alema agifiija kulya oku biryo by'engulube sy'aliko ntaaye wamuheere byo.
15.17: Buzinda agishuba ko, aderha ntya: ‹Abakozi booshi ba daarha bali omu muhimbo, n'obo nyoono hano ndi naafa n'enzara!
15.18: Nagaluka emwa daarha, nanamubwira ntya: “Daarha, najirire echaaha embere za Nnamahanga n'embere zaawe.
15.19: Ntachikwaneene kuyirikwa mugala waawe. Oje wantoola nka muguma w'omu bakozi baawe.”›
15.20: Ava agaluka, aja emw'eshe. «Abeere achiri hale n'aha mwabo, eshe amulangiira, amuyunvira obonjo bunene. Alibirha kumulinga, amuhoobera.
15.21: Omugala aj'amubwira ntya: ‹Daarha, najirire echaaha emwa Nnamahanga n'emwawe, ntachikwaneene guhamagalwa mugala waawe.›
15.22: Aliko eshe abwira abaja baage ntya: ‹Muyanguhe, muleerhe omwambalo gukwiriire bweneene mumuyambise go, mumuyambise olupeta oku mudoke munamuyambise ebiraato.
15.23: Muleerhe enyana eshishire muyibaage; rhujire edinye rhunasiime,
15.24: bulaala oyu mugala waani abaaga afiire leero afuukire, abaaga aherere leero abonekere.› Banarhondera edinye.
15.25: «Mw'ako gashanji, omugala w'efula aliiri omu shwa. Abeere agaluka, n'okuyegeera aha mwabo, ayunva abantu bali kuyimpa n'okuzina.
15.26: Ahamagala muguma omu bakozi b'eshe, amubaza bichi byabeere.
15.27: Omukozi amubwira ntya: ‹Mudoorho waawe agalukire bobunoola yisho ayirhire enyana eshishire, bulaala amubwene mugumaguma.›
15.28: Oyo mugala w'efula ayunva oburhe, alahira kuja omu nju. Eshe ahuluka kumurhebeereza aje mo.
15.29: Aliko abwira eshe ntya: ‹Tala! Hamaagera myaaka minene bweneene eyi ndi nagukolera. Ntashubiraga kuvuna erhegeko lyaawe chiro n'eliguma. N'obo orhashubiraga kumpa chiro omwana gw'empene yi nshagaluka haguma na beera baani.
15.30: Aliko oyu mugala waawe wahezeze ebikulo byaawe omu bubaraga, abeere agaluka, wamubagiire enyana eshishire!›
15.31: Eshe amubwira ntya: ‹Mwana waani, oli haguma naani esiku zooshi, na byooshi ngwerhe biri byaawe.
15.32: Sy'aliko byaalihemere rhujire edinye n'ogushagaluka, bulaala oyu mwene wenyu abaaga afiire, aliko afuukire; abaaga aherere, aliko abonekere!›»

16.1: Yeesu ashuba kubwira abigirizwa baage ntya: «Haliiri omuchire muguma waligwerhe omwimangizi w'ebikulo byaage. Abantu bayinja gusidaaka oyo mwimangizi emwa nnahamwabo oku agwerhe ashandaguza ebikulo byaage.
16.2: Nnahamwabo amuhamagala n'okumubwira ntya: ‹Bichi ndi nayunva baderha elugulu waawe? Nyeerekaga oluganjo lw'ebikulo byaani, bulaala orhagachiba mwimangizi wabyo.›
16.3: Oyo mwimangizi aderha ntya omu murhima gwage: ‹Nnahamwerhu akola kunyaga akaasi kaani. Bichi njirage? Ntaviire nakoomera oguhinga amashwa na kandi nji nagwarha eshoni z'oguhemuuza.
16.4: Ahaa! Namaamenya echi naajira, yi haboneka abanyankiirira emwa baabo hano nkuulwa oku kaasi kaani.›
16.5: Aja ahamagala ngasi muguma waligwerhe omwinda gwa nnahamwabo. Abaza omwambere ntya: ‹Mwinda munganachi gwa nnahamwerhu ogwerhe?›
16.6: Amushubiza ntya: ‹Nkunguru egana z'amavurha.› Oyo mwimangizi w'ebikulo amubwira ntya: ‹Rhoola aka karataasi kayandikirwe k'omwinda gwawe; yikala juba oyandike nkunguru makumi marhaano.›
16.7: Ashuba kubwira owindi ogwerhe omwinda: ‹Naawe mwinda munganachi gwa nnahamwerhu ogwerhe?› Amushubiza ntya: ‹Bigunira egana by'amahemba.› Omwimangizi w'ebikulo amubwira ntya: ‹Rhoola aka karataasi kayandikirwe k'omwinda gwawe; yikala juba onayandike makumi gali munaane.›
16.8: Nyina ebikulo asiima omwimangizi muhemusi, bulaala akolere n'obwenge. Bulaala, abantu b'eri gulu bayanguha omu bijiro byaabo kulusha abantu b'obumoleke.»
16.9: Yeesu ashuba kuderha ntya: «Nyoono mbabwirire ntya: Muchijirire abeera haguma n'obuchire bubi bw'eri gulu, yi hano muba murhachigwerhe obuchire, abantu babayankiirire omu biikalo by'esiku n'amango.
16.10: «Omuntu orhali muhemusi omu bintu bigeeke eyi arhanali muhemusi omu bintu binene; n'omuntu muhemusi omu bintu bigeeke eyi anali muhemusi omu bintu binene.
16.11: Akaba leero mwabeere bantu bahemusi omu buchire bw'eri gulu, nde nji wabajira bimangizi b'obuchire bw'okuli?
16.12: N'akaba mwabeere bantu bahemusi omu bintu byabeene, nde nji wabaheereza ebintu bababikiire?
16.13: «Nta muja wakagala gukolera ba shoobuja babiri: changwa anagaya muguma n'ogusiima owindi, changwa anagishwekera oku muguma n'okuboneerera owindi. Murhakagala gukolera Nnamahanga, munakolere ebikulo.»
16.14: aBafarisaayo babeere bayunva ebi binwa byooshi, barhondera gushekera Yeesu, bulaala basiimaga efuranga.
16.15: Yeesu ababwira ntya: «Muli bantu bachiyeerekana nka ab'okuli embere z'abantu, aliko Nnamahanga ayinji emirhima yenyu. Bulaala, ech'abantu barhoolere nka gikwaneene, chiba chigayisize Nnamahanga.
16.16: «Egihe ch'eRhegeko lya Muusa n'ebitaabu by'abaleebi chagendekeere kugera amango ma Yohaana Mubatiiza. Gurhengera amo mango, oMwazi Mwinja g'oBwami bwa Nnamahanga gwayamageezwe na ngasi muntu y'alwisa kuja mo.
16.17: Aliko byakayolohera empingu n'egulu guhirima, ahaali h'ehinwa hityuuli hy'eRhegeko lya Nnamahanga hirhenge.
16.18: «Ngasi mulume wayegwire mukaage n'agashaba owindi, eyi ajirire obuhushi, n'oshabire omukazi bayegwire, eyi naye ajirire obuhushi.» Omugani g'omuchire na Lazaaro
16.19: «Haliiri mulume muguma w'omugale wagendaga ayambala emyambalo edukwire y'engulo nene. Oyo mugale agendaga ajira edinye ngasi lusiku.
16.20: Haliiri n'omukene muguma oyirikwa Lazaaro wabaaga alyaama embere w'omulyango gw'enju yaage. Omubiri gwa Lazaaro gwali guyunjwire ebihulu.
16.21: Lazaaro aliiri guchifiija kulya orhuboole rhw'ebiryo rhwagendaga rhwarhoga oku meeza m'oyo mugale. Na kandi embwa zagenda zayinja kumiima ebihulu byaage.
16.22: Hagera olusiku oyo mukene afa. Bamalahika bamuheeka ahaburhambi bw'Abrahaamu. Ola mugale naye afa, bamuhamba.
16.23: Agerere ekuzimu, alibuka bweneene. Ayinamula ameesho, alangiira Abrahaamu na Lazaaro ali eburhambi bwage.
16.24: Ava ayaama ntya: ‹Daarha Abrahaamu, ombeere obonjo; obwire Lazaaro ahire esongi ly'omudoke gwage omu menji, ambobeeze olulimi, bulaala ndi nalibuka bweneene m'ogu muliro.›
16.25: Aliko Abrahaamu amushubiza ntya: ‹Mwana waani, yibuka oku waliyankiriire bintu binja binene omu kalamo kaawe, aliko Lazaaro yeewe aligwerhe malibuko manene. Bunoola, yeewe y'arhuleerezwa, aliko wooyo yi walibuka.
16.26: Na kandi, hali omuhonga guleehere bweneene ahagarhi kenyu neerhu. Cho girhumire, abashondere gurhenga eno kuja emunda muli barhakabigala. Na kandi ntaaye wakagala kugera eno munda rhuli gurhengera eyo munda muli.›
16.27: Omugale aderha ntya: ‹Daarha wee, nguhemere n'obonjo, orhume Lazaaro omu mwerhu;
16.28: bulaala ngwerhe beene beerhu barhaano, aje kubahanuula yi nji barhayinja nabo hano hantu h'amalibuko.›
16.29: Abrahaamu amushubiza ntya: ‹Beene benyu bagwerhe ebitaabu bya Muusa na eby'abaleebi, babiyunve.›
16.30: Omugale aderha ntya: ‹Nangwa, daarha Abrahaamu, aliko nk'omuntu muguma afuukire akaja emunda bali, bakaleka ebyaaha byaabo.›
16.31: Aliko Abrahaamu abwira omugale ntya: ‹Akaba barhashondere kuyunva Muusa n'abaleebi, barhakayemeera chiro omuntu wafuukire gurhenga omu bafu.›»

17.1: Yeesu abwira abigirizwa baage ntya: «Ntaako byankaba yi habula ebyaarhuma abantu baajira ebyaaha, aliko buhanya buchi oku omuntu nji waaba mpanvu y'okujira echaaha!
17.2: Kwakabeere kwinja oku yeewe, ashwekerwe olushyo omu gosi, anakabulwe omu nyanja, ahaali h'ogurhuma muguma mw'aba badoorho ajira echaaha.
17.3: Muchilange bwinja mwenyine! «Akaba mwene wenyu akujiriire echaaha, omuhanuule. Akaleka ebyaaha byaage, omubabalire.
17.4: N'akaba akujiriire echaaha kali mushanvu omu lusiku, n'akayinja emunda oli kali mushanvu gukubwira ntya: ‹Nalekere ebyaaha byaani›, omubabalire.» Obwemeezi Matayo 17.19-20
17.6: Nnaweerhu ashubiza ntya: «Nka mwaligwerhe chiro obwemeezi bugeeke kuguma n'ehiburho hye haradaali, mwakabwirire ogu murhi gw'agafuleesi ntya: ‹Chikundula onaje guchibyaala omu nyanja›, gwakanabakengere.» Akaasi k'omuja
17.7: Yeesu ashuba kuderha ntya: «Nka muntu muguma omu mwabo agwerhe omuja ohinga eshwa changwa olagira ebirhungano byaage, hano amubona agaluka gurhenga omu shwa, k'akamubwira ayinje juba alye?
17.8: Nangwa, ahuubwe akamubwira ntya: ‹Nvuyira ebyaani biryo, onayambale bwinja, ompe ndye nanywe; naawe handeke walya onanywe buzinda.›
17.9: Arhagasiimiriza omuja waage okw'ajirire eby'alirhegekerwe kujira, k'arhali ntyo?
17.10: Nenyu ntyo kubinali: hano nji muba mwamakola byooshi bibarhegekerwe, muderhe ntya: ‹Rhuli baja barhagwerhe kamaro, hoshaaho rhwajirire ebi rhwalihemerwe kujira.›» Yeesu afumya babenzibenzi ekumi
17.11: Yeesu abeere ali omu njira aja eYerusaleema, agera eburhambirhambi b'olubibi lugabire eSamariya n'eGalilaaya.
17.12: Abeere aja omu gishagala chiguma, ababenzibenzi ekumi bayinja kumushimaana. Bayimanga hale naye.
17.13: Barhondera kuyaama ntya: «Yeesu, Mwigiriza, orhubeere obonjo!»
17.14: Yeesu abeere ababona, ababwira ntya: «Muje guchiyeerekana emw'abadaahwa.» Babeere bali baaja yo, baava baafuma.
17.15: Muguma omu bo, abeere abona afumire, agaluka akuuza Nnamahanga n'omulenge munene.
17.16: Achikabula embere z'amagulu ma Yeesu, amalanga oku budaka, amubwira kooko. Oyu muntu aliiri Musamariya.
17.17: Yeesu ava aderha ntya: «K'arhali booshi ekumi baafumaga? Ngahe bandi mwenda bali?
17.18: Ka ntaaye wakengereere kugaluka gukuuza Nnamahanga, kuleka oyu orhali Muyaahudi?»
17.19: Yeesu aja amubwira ntya: «Yimanga ogende, obwemeezi bwawe bwaguchungwire.» Okuyinja k'oBwami bwa Nnamahanga
17.20: aBafarisaayo baabaza Yeesu ntya: «Mango machi oBwami bwa Nnamahanga nji bwayinja?» Yeesu abashubiza ntya: «oBwami bwa Nnamahanga burhayinja bwachitaragaza.
17.21: Abantu barhakaderha ntya: ‹Mulolage! oBwami bwa Nnamahanga buli hano!›, changwa: ‹Buli halira!› Bulaala, mumenyage bwinja, oBwami bwa Nnamahanga buli ahagarhi kenyu.» Esiku za Mwene oMuntu Matayo 24.26-27; Mariko 13.21-22
17.22: Yeesu ashuba kubwira abigirizwa baage ntya: «Agashanji kayinja nji mwachifiija kubona Mwene oMuntu chiro lusiku luguma, aliko nji murhamubona.
17.23: «Abantu nji bababwira ntya: ‹Ali haliira!›, changwa: ‹Ali hano!› Murhalibirhiraga yo.
17.24: Nka kula omubaraganyo gubaraganya omu nkuba gurhengera omu luhande luguma guhika omu lwindi, ntyo ku Mwene oMuntu nj'aba omu olusiku lwage.
17.25: Aliko embere Mwene oMuntu agaluke, bihemere alibuke bweneene analahirwe n'echi gisisi. Matayo 24.37-39
17.26: «Nk'oku byabaaga omu siku za Noowa , ku nji byaaba amango Mwene oMuntu nj'agaluka.
17.27: Abantu bagendaga baalya n'okunywa, bagendaga baashaba n'ogushabwa, kugera oku lusiku Noowa ajaaga omu nkuge. Leero emisuuka minene yahulula, yabazisya booshi.
17.28: «Kandi nji byaaba kuguma n'esiku za Looti: abantu bagendaga baalya n'okunywa, bagendaga baagula n'okuguza, bagendaga bahinga n'okuyumbaka.
17.29: Sy'aliko olusiku Looti arhengaga eSodoomo, omuliro n'ebiseese byarhoga gurengera oku nkuba nka nvula, byayirha abantu booshi.
17.30: Kandi ntyo ku nji byaaba olusiku Mwene oMuntu nj'agaluka. Matayo 24.17-18; Mariko 13.15-16
17.31: «Olo lusiku, omuntu nji waaba ali oku nju elugulu, arhajaaga omu nju gurhoola ebintu byaage. N'ola muntu nji waaba ali omu shwa lyaage arhachigalukaga emwage.
17.33: Omuntu nji washonda kulanga akalamo kaage nj'agaheza; aliko omuntu nji washonda kugaheza nj'akalanga. Matayo 24.40-41
17.34: «Mbabwirire, m'obo budufu, bantu babiri nji baaba balyaamire oku buliri buguma: muguma nj'aheekwa, owindi nj'alekwa.
17.35: Bakazi babiri nji baaba bali basyera haguma: muguma nj'aheekwa, owindi nj'alekwa. [
17.36: Bantu babiri nji baaba bali omu shwa: muguma nj'aheekwa, owindi nj'alekwa.»]
17.37: Abigirizwa baabaza Yeesu ntya: «Nnaweerhu, ngahe ebyo nji byabeera?» Naye abashubiza ntya: «Ahali omurhumba, ho hagwirira banyunda .»

18.1: Yeesu ashuba guchiira abigirizwa baage ogu mugani y'abayeereka oku bakwaneene gusaliira buzira kuluha.
18.2: Aderha ntya: «Omu gishagala chiguma haliiri omuzuuzi muguma orhayuubahaga Nnamahanga na nta muntu akengaga.
18.3: Kandi mw'echo gishagala haliiri omushumbakazi muguma wagendaga aja kubwira oyo muzuuzi ntya: ‹Onchiire bwinja olushinja n'omushombanyi waani!›
18.4: Halenga siku zinene alahiire kumuchiira lo. Aliko buzinda achibwira ntya: ‹Nachiro mpu ntayuubaha Nnamahanga na nta muntu nkenga,
18.5: aliko bunoola oyu mushumbakazi ali andunza, namuchiira bwinja olushinja lwage, arhayinja kumbera erhwe.›»
18.6: Nnaweerhu aja aderha ntya: «Muyunve bwinja eby'oyu muzuuzi muhemusi aderhere!
18.7: Ka Nnamahanga yeewe arhagachiira bwinja olushinja abantu baage achishogere, n'obo bali bamulilira ezuuba n'obudufu? Ka nj'alegama kubarhabaala?
18.8: Mbabwirire oku Nnamahanga nj'abachiira bwinja olushinja jubaajuba. Sy'aliko amango Mwene oMuntu nj'agaluka, ka nj'abugaana obwemeezi omu gulu?» Omugani g'oMufarisaayo n'omufurhiisa w'amakooli
18.9: Yeesu ashuba gucha ogu mugani oku bantu baliiri guchiibona oku bakwaneene n'ogukena abandi bantu:
18.10: «Lusiku luguma, bantu babiri baja gusaliira omu Nju ya Nnamahanga. Muguma aliiri Mufarisaayo n'owindi aliiri mufurhiisa w'amakooli.
18.11: oMufarisaayo ayimanga, asaliira ntya omu murhima gwage: ‹Nnamahanga wee, nguheere obukuuze bulaala ntali kuguma n'abandi bantu. Boowe bali bishumuusi, barhakwaneene, bali bahushi. Kandi ntali kuguma n'oyu mufurhiisa w'amakooli.
18.12: Nanchiibuza kulya kabiri omu boso, nampaana chigabi chiguma ch'ekumi ch'ebintu mbona.›
18.13: Aliko omufurhiisa w'amakooli yeewe, aliyimangire hale. Chiro arhanagalaga kuyinamula ameesho elugulu, sy'aliko achishuurha egifuba omu kuyeerekana oku arhakwaneene. Aderha ntya: ‹Yoo! Nnamahanga, ombeere obonjo, nye munyabyaaha!›
18.14: Yeesu aja aderha ntya: ‹Mbabwirire, oyu mufurhiisa w'amakooli yi wagalukire emwage ey'akwaneene, si arhali ola Mufarisaayo. Kwenge ngasi muntu yeeshi wachizamuula nj'ayandagazwa, aliko ola wachiyandagaza nj'azamuulwa.›» Yeesu agisha abaana badoorho Matayo 19.13-15; Mariko 10.13-16
18.15: Bantu baguma baleerhera Yeesu enjolyaana nazo mpu azigishe omu kuzihira kw'amaboko. Abigirizwa baage babeere baabona ntyo, bakalihira abo bantu.
18.16: Aliko Yeesu arhegeka oku bamuleerhere abo baana n'okuderha ntya: «Muleke abaana bayinje emunda ndi! Murhababuzaga, bulaala oBwami bwa Nnamahanga buli bw'abantu bali kuguma nabo.
18.17: Mbabwirire okuli: omuntu orhayankiriire oBwami bwa Nnamahanga nka mwana mudoorho arhakabuja mo chiro n'ehityu.» Yeesu aganiira n'omugale muguma Matayo 19.16-30; Mariko 10.17-31
18.18: Omukulu muguma w'aBayaahudi abaza Yeesu ntya: «Mwigiriza mwinja, bichi ngwasize kujira yi mbona akalamo k'esiku n'amango?»
18.19: Yeesu amushubiza ntya: «Gurhe wankanyirika mwinja? Nta muntu mwinja, arhali Nnamahanga yenyine.
18.20: Sy'omenyere amarhegeko: ‹Orhahushaga, orhayirhaga, orhazimbaga, orhahamiirizaga obubeeshi, okenge yisho na nyoko.›»
18.21: Oyo mukulu ashubiza ntya: «Ama marhegeko mooshi namakengere gurhenga ndi musole.»
18.22: Yeesu abeere ayunva ntyo, amubwira ntya: «Hachikubuliire kandi chintu chiguma: oguze ebintu byooshi ogwerhe, efuranga zarhenga mo ozigabire abakene, nji wanaja wagwarha obuchire omu mpingu. Wanaja wayinja n'okunkulikira.»
18.23: Aliko oyo muntu abeere ayunva ntyo, agaya bweneene, bulaala aliiri muchire bweneene.
18.24: Yeesu abwene oku agayire, aderha ntya: «Okuli, bikomereere abachire kuja omu Bwami bwa Nnamahanga!
18.25: Bulaala kuyoloheere bweneene engamiya kugera omu hirhule hy'esindani ahaali h'omugale kuja omu Bwami bwa Nnamahanga.»
18.26: Abantu baliiri bamuyunviriza baderha ntya: «Nde leero wagachungulwa?»
18.27: Yeesu ashubiza ntya: «Ebirhakagalika oku bantu byakagalika emwa Nnamahanga.»
18.28: Petero aja aderha ntya: «Tala oku rhwewe rhwalekere ebintu rhwali rhugwerhe yi rhugukulikira.»
18.29: Yeesu ababwira ntya: «Mbabwire okuli, nta muntu walekere enju, mukaage, beene baabo, abazeere baage changwa abaana baage elugulu w'obwime bwa Nnamahanga,
18.30: orhakayankirira ebintu binene mu mano mango, n'omu siku zayinja nj'abona akalamo k'esiku n'amango.» Yeesu abala kandi ogufa n'ogufuuka kwage Matayo 20.17-19; Mariko 10.32-34
18.31: Buzinda bw'aho, Yeesu arhoola zila ntumwa zaage ekumi n'ebiri n'okuzibwira ntya: «Tala oku rhwazamuukira eYerusaleema; byooshi byayandikwaga n'abaleebi bilolere Mwene oMuntu byajirika.
18.32: Bulaala nj'ahaanwa oku barhali Bayaahudi. Nji bamushinyagulira, nji bamulibuza, nji bamuchiira ko,
18.33: nji bamushuurha, nji banamuyirha. N'olusiku lwa gasharhu nj'afuuka.»
18.34: Aliko barhayunvaga eby'echi chinwa chiderhere, bulaala byaali bishirwe. Barhaalimenyere bichi Yeesu ashondaga kuderha. Yeesu afumya empumi eYeeriko Matayo 20.29-34; Mariko 10.46-52
18.35: Amango Yeesu ayegeeraga egishagala ch'eYeeriko, haliiri empumi nguma yali yikeere eburhambi bw'enjira ey'eri yahemuuza.
18.36: Eyo mpumi yayunva abantu banene yi baagera, yanabaza bichi byabeere.
18.38: Empumi yaliika omulenge: «Yeesu, Mwene Daawudi, ombeere obonjo!»
18.39: Abaliiri balambagira embere bayikalihira yi bayisizya, aliko yayaama bweneene: «Mwene Daawudi, ombeere obonjo!»
18.40: Yeesu ayimanga n'ogurhegeka oku bayileerhere ye. Empumi yabeere yaagera hoofu naye, Yeesu ayibaza ntya:
18.41: «Gichi oshondere nkujirirage?» Yashubiza ntya: «Nnaweerhu, nshube mbone.»
18.42: Yeesu ayishubiza ntya: «Shuba kubona; obwemeezi bwawe bwagufumize.»
18.43: Ho n'aho yabona n'okumukulikira ey'eri yakuuza Nnamahanga. Olubaga looshi lwabeere lwabona ebyoola, lwarhondera gukuuza Nnamahanga.

19.1: Yeesu aliiri abalama kugerera omu gishagala ch'eYeeriko.
19.2: Mw'echo gishagala mwaliiri omuntu muguma oyirikwa Zaakayo. Oyo Zaakayo aliiri mukulu w'abafurhiisa b'amakooli. Aliiri muchire.
19.3: Agendaga ashonda kubona Yeesu ali nde. Aliko, elugulu w'abantu banene arhakamubwene bulaala aliiri muufu.
19.4: Alibirhira embere, anashona oku murhi g'omukuyu y'abona Yeesu, kwenge alikwaneene kulenga ahoola.
19.5: Yeesu abeere agera ahoola, ayinamula ameesho anamubwira ntya: «Zaakayo, shonooka juba; bulaala bimpemere ndyaame emwawe zeene.»
19.6: Zaakayo ashonooka juba, ayankirira Yeesu n'obushagaluke bunene.
19.7: Abantu booshi baabonaga ebyoola, balunduma n'okuderha ntya: «Mulolage! Oyu muntu ajiire kulyaama emw'omunyabyaaha!»
19.8: Aliko Zaakayo ayimanga, abwira Nnaweerhu ntya: «Nnaweerhu! Naaha abakene oluhande lw'ebintu byaani, n'akaba hali eyi nalengenye echintu chaage, namugalulira cho eyi nkubire cho kane.»
19.9: Yeesu amubwira ntya: «Zeene obuchunguke bwahikire mw'eyila nju, bulaala oyu naye ali mugala w'Abrahaamu.
19.10: Kwenge Mwene oMuntu ayinjire gushonda n'oguchungula abaherere.» Omugani gwa baja ekumi Matayo 25.14-30
19.11: Abantu babeere bayunva ebyoola, bakengeera okw'obwime bwa Nnamahanga bukola kubonekana ho n'aho, bulaala Yeesu aliiri hoofu n'eYerusaleema. Aja ashuba kubachiira ogu mugani.
19.12: Aderha ntya: «Haliiri murhwali muguma wajaaga omu gihugo cha hale mpu aje kuyimikirwa yo, buzinda agaluke kuyima omu gihugo chaage.
19.13: Ahamagala bantu ekumi omu baja baage, abaha bicheri ekumi n'okubabwira ntya: ‹Murhimbuule n'ezi furanga kugera amango nagaluka.›
19.14: Aliko abantu b'egihugo chaage babaaga bamugayire. Baarhuma abantu enyuma zaage kuderha ntya: ‹Rhurhashonda oyu muntu abe mwami weerhu.›
19.15: «Abeere ayimikirwe, agaluka, ahamagaza bala baja ahaaga efuranga, mpu amenye enyungu nchi babwene omu burhimbuuzi.
19.16: Omuja mwambere achimoleka n'okuderha ntya: ‹Waliha, egicheri chaawe chayungukire bindi ekumi.›
19.17: Mwami amubwira ntya: ‹Kooko, oli muja mwinja; bulaala orhabeere muhemusi omu bintu bigeeke, wagwarha oburhegesi oku bishagala ekumi.›
19.18: Omuja wakabiri ayinja n'okuderha ntya: ‹Waliha, egicheri chaawe chayungukire bindi birhaano.›
19.19: Mwami amubwira ntya: ‹Naawe waaba murhegesi wa bishagala birhaano.›
19.20: Owindi muja ayinja n'okuderha ntya: ‹Waliha, tala egicheri chaawe, nalichibiikire omu gitambara,
19.21: kwenge nali nkuyuubahire, bulaala oba muntu mudaarhi bweneene. Wooyo onarhoola eby'orhabiikaga, n'ogushaluula eby'orhahingaga.›
19.22: Mwami amubwira ntya: ‹Wooyo oli muja mubi, naguchiira olushinja gukulikirana n'ebinwa byaawe. Akaba waliyinji oku mba mudaarhi, oku ntoola ebi ntabiikaga n'oku nshaluula ebi ntahingaga,
19.23: bichi byarhumaga orhahira efuranga zaani omu banke? Omu kugaluka kwani, nakazirhoolere n'enyungu!›
19.24: Mwami aja abwira abantu baliiri ho ntya: ‹Mumunyage echo gicheri mugihe olaala ogwerhe bicheri ekumi.›
19.25: Babwira mwami ntya: ‹Waliha, oyoola akola agwerhe bicheri ekumi!›
19.26: Abashubiza ntya: ‹Mbabwirire oku ogwerhe akantu yi nji baheereza akandi, aliko orhagwerhe kantu nji bamunyaga n'ehintu hityuuli agwerhe.
19.27: N'bashombanyi baani boowe, barhalishondere oku mbe mwami waabo, mubaleerhe hano munabayirhire embere zaani.›» Yeesu aja eYerusaleema Matayo 21.1-9; Mariko 11.1-10; Yohaana 12.12-16
19.28: Yeesu abeere amala kuderha ntyo, aja embere z'abantu eyi bali bayeerekera eYerusaleema.
19.29: Abeere agera hoofu n'egishagala ch'eBetefaage n'eche Betaniiya, hoofu n'omusozi gw'eMizeyituuni, arhuma bigirizwa baage babiri,
19.30: ababwira ntya: «Muje omu gishagala chiri embere zenyu. Hano muchigera mo, mwashimaana omwana gw'epunda gushwekerwe, nta muntu oshubiraga yikala oku go. Mugishwekuule munachileerhe.
19.31: Nka hali omuntu obabazize ntya: ‹Gichi girhumire muli mwagishwekuula?› Mumushubize oku Nnaweerhu achilagire ko.»
19.32: Abo bigirizwa barhumwaga bagenda, banabugaana byooshi nk'oku Yeesu ababwiraga.
19.33: Babeere bali bashwekuula omwana gw'epunda, banyina go bababaza ntya: «Gichi girhumire muli mwashwekuula ogu mwana gw'epunda?»
19.35: Baja baguleerhera Yeesu. Baava baasasa ko emyambalo n'okumuyikaza ko.
19.36: Okw'ali agenda, abantu baalema baasasa emyambalo yaabo omu njira.
19.37: Yeesu abeere ali ayegeera hoofu n'omwandagalo gw'omusozi gw'eMizeyituuni, echigusho chooshi ch'abigirizwa baage, babaaga bali kugenda baamoga. Babaaga bali bakuuza Nnamahanga n'omulenge munene, elugulu w'ebisomereene byooshi bali babwene ko.
19.38: Baliiri kuderha ntya: «Agishwe, oMwami wayinjire, oku ziino lya Nnaweerhu! Omurhuula gube omu mpingu n'obulangashane emwa Nnamahanga!»
19.39: aBafarisaayo baguma, baliiri omu lubaga lw'abantu, babwira Yeesu ntya: «Mwigiriza, okalihire abigirizwa baawe basire.»
19.40: Yeesu abashubiza ntya: «Mbabwirire byo, bagasira, amabaale mo mayaama!» Yeesu alakira egishagala ch'eYerusaleema
19.41: Amango Yeesu ageraga hoofu n'egishagala ch'eYerusaleema, abeere abona cho, alakira cho.
19.42: Aderha ntya: «Nka naawe wamenyaga zeene ebyagakuleerhera omurhuula! Aliko bunoola bibishirwe, orhakabibona.
19.43: Kwenge esiku zakuyinjira amango bashombanyi baawe bakuzirhira ko olugurhu, bakugorha n'okugufundeeza enyunda zooshi.
19.44: Baguhomboola looshi, wooyo n'abantu baawe. Barhagakulekera baale oku lindi, bulaala orhamenyaga egihe Nnamahanga ayinjaga gukulwira ko!» Yeesu alibisya abarhimbuuzi omu Nju ya Nnamahanga Matayo 21.12-17; Mariko 11.15-17; Yohaana 2.13-17
19.45: Yeesu abeere aja omu Nju ya Nnamahanga, arhondera kulibisya abarhimbuuzi.
19.46: Ava ababwira ntya: «Biyandikirwe: ‹Enju yaani nji yaaba nju y'amasaala.› Aliko mwabo mwayijirire lukunda lw'abeezi!»
19.47: Yeesu agendaga ayigiriza esiku zooshi omu Nju ya Nnamahanga. Abakulu b'abadaahwa, abigiriza b'amarhegeko n'abashamuka b'aBayaahudi balemaga bashonda kumuyirha.
19.48: Aliko bafundwa, bulaala abantu booshi baliiri bamuyunviriza bwinja buzira kuluha.

20.1: Lusiku luguma, oku Yeesu ali ayigiriza abantu omu Nju ya Nnamahanga n'okubala oMwanzi Mwinja, ho n'aho abakulu b'abadaahwa n'abigiriza b'amarhegeko, haguma n'abashamuka b'aBayaahudi baahulukira.
20.2: Baava baamubaza ntya: «Orhubwire oku burhegesi bwa nde oli waajira ebi bintu. Nde ye waguhaaga obu burhegesi?»
20.3: Yeesu abashubiza ntya: «Naani, nababaza echibazo chiguma, munshubize:
20.4: ‹Obubatiizo bwa Yohaana ka bwarhengeraga empingu changwa emw'abantu?›»
20.5: Babwirana ntya bonyine oku bonyine: «Rhukaderha okw'empingu, arhubaza gichi charhumaga rhurhamuyemeera.
20.6: Kandi rhugashubiza oku emw'abantu, olubaga looshi lwarhuyirhiisa amabaale, kwenge lwali luyemereere oku Yohaana aliiri muleebi.»
20.7: Ntyo ku bamushubiize oku barhenji ngahe bwarhengeraga.
20.8: Yeesu aja ababwira ntya: «Ko n'oko naani, ntababwira oku burhegesi bwa nde njira ebi bintu.» Omugani gw'abahinzi babi Matayo 21.33-46; Mariko 12.1-12
20.9: Kandi Yeesu ashuba kubachiira guno mugani: «Haliiri muntu muguma wahingaga eshwa ly'emizabiibu, aliyadiisa abahinzi n'okubalama siku zinene.
20.10: Egihe ch'ogushaluula chabeere chagera ho, arhuma omuja waage emwa bala bahinzi mpu bamuheerezage amaage malehe m'eshwa. Aliko abo bahinzi bashuurha oyo muja n'okumugalula maboko moomu.
20.11: Nyina eshwa ashuba gurhuma owindi muja. Naye bamushuurha, bamudukanga, banamugalula maboko moomu.
20.12: Ashuba gurhuma omuja wa gasharhu. Bamukoromesa, banamukabula embuga.
20.13: Nyina eshwa aderha ntya: ‹Gurhe naaja naajira? Naaja narhuma mugala waani muzigirwa, nkabaga yeewe bamukenga.›
20.14: Aliko balaala bahinzi babeere bamulangiira, babwirana ntya: ‹Tala, oyuula yi waaba nyina agashambala! Rhumuyirhe, y'agashambala kaba keerhu.›
20.15: Bamukuula omu shwa, banamuyirha.» Yeesu aja abaza abantu ntya: «Nyina eshwa gurhe nj'ajira aboola bahinzi?
20.16: Nj'agaluka, nj'anayirha aboola bahinzi, nj'anaheereza abandi eshwa.» Abantu babeere bayunva ntyo, baaderha ntya: «Ebiri ntya birhahira bikaba!»
20.17: Aliko Yeesu abaloleereza, aderha ntya: «Echi chinwa chiyandikirwe gurhe chiderhere? Ebaale ab'okuyumbaka balahiraga, lyo lyahindukire ly'engenzi, ly'okuyumbakira ko.
20.18: Ngasi muntu nji wakumbagala kw'eryo baale nj'avunagulika; n'eyi nji lyarhogera ko nji lyamuhomboola.»
20.19: Ho n'aho, abigiriza b'amarhegeko n'abakulu b'abadaahwa bashonda ogushweka Yeesu, bulaala bali bayinji oku bo baderherwe mw'ogu mugani. Aliko bayuubaha abantu. Echibazo ch'ogufurha ekooli lya Kayizaari Matayo 22.15-22; Mariko 12.13-17
20.20: Abo bakulu b'aBayaahudi barhondera guhenguuza Yeesu. Baamurhumira abantu b'okumuneeka, baliiri kubonekana nka bali b'okuli yi bamufarhira omu nderho, n'okulengera eyo njira bagale kumuhaana omu maboko m'omurhegesi w'egihugo.
20.21: Aba bantu baabaza Yeesu ntya: «Mwigiriza, rhuyinji oku oderha n'okuyigiriza bwinja; orhajira kaboolo, aliko oyigiriza enjira ya Nnamahanga gukulikirana n'okuli.
20.22: Orhubwirage leero, k'amarhegeko meerhu mayemereere changwa malahiire gufurha ekooli emwa Kayizaari?»
20.23: Aliko Yeesu amenya obulyaalya bwabo, ababaza ntya:
20.24: «Munyereke egicheri chiguma ch'edinaari. Giheekere eshusho n'eziino lya nde?» Baashubiza ntya: «Biri bya Kayizaari.»
20.25: Yeesu aja ababwira ntya: «Mugende mwaheereza Kayizaari ebiri byaage, na Nnamahanga naye ebiri byaage.»
20.26: Bafundwa kumufarhira oku chiguma omu binwa byaage embere z'olubaga. Basoomererwa egishubizo chaage, baava baasira. Echibazo ch'ogufuuka kw'abafu Matayo 22.23-33; Mariko 12.18-27
20.27: Buzinda bw'aho, aBasadukaayo baguma baaja emwa Yeesu. aBasadukaayo bo barhayemeeraga obufuuke bw'abafu. Bayinja kubaza Yeesu ntya:
20.28: «Mwigiriza, tala oku Muusa arhuyandikiire ntya: ‹Nk'omulume aligwerhe omukazi, aliko agafa buzira mwana, mwene waabo anarhoola oyo mukazi n'okuburhira nyagufa abaana.›
20.29: Leero haliiri bazaana mushanvu ba nda nguma. Omwambere ashaba n'ogufa buzira mwana.
20.30: Owakabiri naye ayingira ola mukazi, naye afa buzira mwana.
20.31: N'owagasharhu naye ko n'oko. Byaaba ntyo oku booshi mushanvu, baafa buzira kuleka abaana.
20.32: Aha buzinda, ola mukazi naye afa.
20.33: Leero amango m'ogufuuka, oyo mukazi nj'aba wa nde? Bulaala aliiri mukaabo booshi oku bali mushanvu!»
20.34: Yeesu abashubiza ntya: «Mu lino gulu, abalume n'abakazi yi bashabana.
20.35: Aliko abaganjirwe kulama mw'elyo gulu lyayinja n'ogufuuka gurhenga omu bafu nji barhaashaba changwa gushabwa.
20.36: Barhaakanafa, bulaala bali kuguma na bamalahika, bali bagala ba Nnamahanga kwenge bafuukire.
20.37: Muusa ayerekeene bwinjabwinja oku abafu nji bafuuka. Omu mandiko maage aderhere elugulu w'egishaka chagulumiraga. Yeewe aderhere oku Nnaweerhu ali ‹Nnamahanga wa Abrahaamu, Nnamahanga wa Isaka na Nnamahanga wa Yakobo.›»
20.38: Yeesu ashuba kuderha ntya: «Nnamahanga arhali w'abafu, aliko w'abalamire; kwenge oku yeewe booshi balamire.»
20.39: Abigiriza baguma b'amarhegeko bashubiza ntya: «Mwigiriza, waderhere bwinja.»
20.40: Barhagishubiraga chiro kubaza liguma. Krisitu na Daawudi Matayo 22.41-46; Mariko 12.35-37
20.41: Yeesu abaza abantu baliiri ahoola ntya: «Gurhe abantu bakaderha mpu Krisitu ali mugala wa Daawudi?
20.42: Daawudi yenyine aderhere ntya omu gitaabu ch'eNanga: ‹Nnaweerhu Nnamahanga abwirire Nnaweerhu ntya: “Yikale ekulyo kwani,
20.43: guhika amango nji naajira bashombanyi baawe ndabarhiro yaawe.”›
20.44: Leero akonva Daawudi amuyirikire Nnaweerhu, gurhe akaja aba mugala waage?» Yeesu abwira abigirizwa baage bachilange n'abigiriza b'amarhegeko Matayo 23.1,5-7,14; Mariko 12.37-40
20.45: Abantu booshi babeere bali bayunviriza Yeesu, abwira abigirizwa baage ntya:
20.46: «Muchilange oku bigiriza b'amarhegeko. Basiima guchilambagiza n'efulema zileehere, n'okulamuswa n'obukenge ah'abantu banene bali, okuyikala oku ntebe z'embere omu masinagoogi n'omu madinye.
20.47: Bananyaga abashumbakazi ebintu byaabo byooshi. N'omu guchisiisa, banajira amasaala maleehere. Abo bantu, nji baahanwa bweneene.»

21.1: Yeesu ayinamula ameesho, abona abagale bali bahira entuulo zaabo omu gasanduku k'entuulo k'omu Nju ya Nnamahanga.
21.2: Abona omushumbakazi muguma w'omukene naye ahira mo rhucheri rhubiri rhw'efuranga.
21.3: Yeesu ava aderha ntya: «Okuli mbabwirire, oyu mushumbakazi w'omukene arhuulire kulusha abandi booshi;
21.4: kwenge abandi bantu booshi barhuulire nka ntuulo efuranga barhaalichilagire ko. Aliko yeewe, omu bukene bwage, arhuulire byooshi aligwerhe by'okulama nabyo.» Yeesu abala ogushandwa kw'eNju ya Nnamahanga Matayo 24.1-2; Mariko 13.1-2
21.5: Bantu baguma babeere bali baderha okw'eNju ya Nnamahanga eyumbakirwe n'amabaale menja, na kandi epambirwe n'ebintu abantu barhuuliraga Nnamahanga, Yeesu aderha ntya:
21.6: «Hayinja esiku, ebiila muli kubona ko, harhagasigala baale oku lindi lirhagahiningulwa.» Ebimenyeeso by'amalibuko Matayo 24.3-8; Mariko 13.3-8
21.7: Abo bantu baabaza Yeesu ntya: «Mwigiriza, lyaali ebyoola nji byaahika? Kimenyeeso gichi nji chayeerekana oku byashonda kujirika?»
21.8: Yeesu ashubiza ntya: «Muchilange, mumenye mwagahera. Bantu banene nji bayinja omu gukoleesa eziino lyaani n'okuderha ntya: ‹Nye Masiiya!›, na kandi: ‹Egihe chayeneere!› Aliko murhabakulikiraga.
21.9: Amango nji mwayunva badeerha emyaazi y'ebiirha na ey'okulwisa abarhegesi, murhayuubahaga. Kwenge ebyoola bikwaneene gurhanga kujirika. Aliko eyi burhaza kuba b'obuzinda bwa lino gulu.»
21.10: Yeesu aja alema ababwira ntya: «Egihugo nji chalwisa echindi gihugo, n'obwami nji bwalwisa obwindi bwami.
21.11: Nji haaba emisisi mineneenene, n'omu hantu hanene, nji haaba enzara n'endwala zinene z'okuyaahukira. Nji haaba kandi ebigiriginjo biyuubahize n'ebimenyeeso by'arhengera omu nkuba.» Amalibuko nji maaba embere w'egihe ch'obuzinda Matayo 10.17-22; Mariko 13.9-12
21.12: «Aliko, embere z'ebi byooshi, abantu nji babagwarha n'okubalibuza. Nji babahaana omu masinagoogi, nji banabahira omu munyororo. Ko n'oko, nji babasidaakira embere z'abaami n'abakulu b'egihugo elugulu w'eziino lyaani.
21.13: Ebyoola nji byaarhuma mwahamiiriza ebi munyinji ko.
21.14: Mumenye bwinja omu mirhima yenyu oku murhakwaneene gurheganya gurhe mwabuurana.
21.15: Bulaala nyoono, nji naabaha nyenyine echinwa n'obwenge bunene, oku bulyo bashombanyi benyu barhakagala kubahima changwa kulahira ebi mwaderhere.
21.16: Nji mwalenganywa n'abazeere benyu, na beene benyu, na ab'omulala gwenyu, na beera benyu. Na baguma omu mwabo nji bayirhwa. Matayo 24.9-13; Mariko 13.13
21.17: «Abantu booshi nji babashomba elugulu w'eziino lyaani.
21.18: Aliko nta luviiri luguma l'oku rhwe lyenyu nji lwahera.
21.19: Omu guchihangaana kwenyu, mwachungula akalamo kenyu.» Ogushandwa kw'egishagala ch'eYerusaleema Matayo 24.15-22; Mariko 13.14-20
21.20: «Hano nji mubona egishagala ch'eYerusaleema chagorherwe n'ebigusho by'abasoda, mwanaja mwamenya oku ogushandaazwa kwacho kwagerere hoofu.
21.21: Leero, abantu nji baaba bali eYudeeya balibirhire omu misozi. N'aba nji baaba bali omu gishagala ch'eYerusaleema barhenge mo, n'aba nji baaba bali omu rhwango barhajaaga eYerusaleema.
21.22: Kwenge nji zaaba siku z'oguhanwa kw'abantu, yi byooshi biyandikirwe bijirika.
21.23: Buhanya buchi oku bakazi nji baaba bali bukule n'oku balaala nji baaba bali kuyonsa mw'ezoola siku! Nji haaba amalibuko manene omu gihugo, n'oburhe bwa Nnamahanga nji bwaba kw'olu lubaga.
21.24: Baguma nji bayirhwa n'engoorho, abandi nji baheekwa buja omu bihugo byooshi, na Yerusaleema nj'alabarhwa n'abapagaani, kugera amango egihe chaabo nji chayeenera.» Okuyinja kwa Mwene oMuntu Matayo 24.29-31; Mariko 13.24-27
21.25: «Nji haaba ebimenyeeso omu zuuba, omu gahembi n'omu nyenyeezi. Na hano oku gulu nako, embaga nji zaaba omu malibuko n'ogufarhwa n'obuuba elugulu w'olwamo n'emilaba y'enyanja.
21.26: Abantu nji baalaba n'obuuba bunene omu kulinga ebi nji byayinjira egulu, kwenge byooshi bigwerhe obuhashe omu chaalege nji byashaganywa.
21.27: Nji baaja baabona Mwene oMuntu ayinjire omu bichu haguma n'obuhashe n'obukuuze bunene.
21.28: Hano ebyoola nji birhondera kuyinja, muyimange bwinjabwinja murhanayuubahaga, bulaala obuchunguke bwenyu bwayegereere.» Obwime bwa Nnamahanga buli hoofu Matayo 24.32-35; Mariko 13.28-31
21.29: Buzinda bw'aho, Yeesu abachiira guno mugani: «Mulole omurhi gw'omutiini n'eyindi mirhi yooshi.
21.30: Eyi mubona yaashoga, munamenya mwenyine okw'echanda chiri hoofu.
21.31: Ko n'oko kandi, amango nji mwabona ebyoola byayinja, mumenye okw'obwime bwa Nnamahanga buli hoofu.
21.32: Okuli, mbabwirire, echi gisisi girhakagera ebyoola byooshi birhanaza kuyinja.
21.33: Empingu n'egulu nji byaahirima, aliko ebinwa byaani birhagahirima.» Okulingiriza oguhika kwa Yeesu
21.34: Yeesu ashuba kuderha ntya: «Muchilange, emirhima yenyu yakayinja zikira omu budambi, omu bulalu, n'enyifinjo z'akalamo, y'olusiku luzinda lwakayinja kubagera ko buzira kumenya,
21.35: kula omurhego gushuuduka. Kwenge nji lwayinjira abantu booshi balamire oku gulu.
21.36: Mutarame, munasaliire ngasi gashanji, yi mugwarha emisi y'ogufuma byooshi byayinja, n'okugala kuyimanga embere za Mwene oMuntu.» Yeesu agendeerera kuyigiriza omu Nju ya Nnamahanga
21.37: Mw'ezoola siku, Yeesu agendaga ayigiriza omu Nju ya Nnamahanga ezuuba. N'obudufu, agendaga aja kulyaama oku musozi gw'eMizeyituuni.
21.38: Olubaga looshi lwagendaga lwaja emunda ali omu Nju ya Nnamahanga eseeziseezi kumuyunviriza.

22.1: Olusiku lukulu lw'emigati nzira chachu, luyirikwa Paasaka, lwabaaga luli hoofu.
22.2: Abakulu b'abadaahwa n'abigiriza b'amarhegeko baliiri bashonda gurhe bakayirhiisa Yeesu. Aliko baliiri bayuubaha olubaga.
22.3: Shetaani aja aja mu Yuuda, ola bayirikaga Isikariyooti, waliiri muguma w'omu zila ntumwa ekumi n'ebiri.
22.4: Yuuda aja kuganiira haguma n'abakulu b'abadaahwa n'abakulu b'abalanzi b'eNju ya Nnamahanga gurhe akalenganya Yeesu emunda bali.
22.6: Yuuda ayemeera n'ogurhondera kulonza agashanji gakwiriire k'okumuha bo buzira abantu kumenya. Yeesu arheganyisa ebiryo by'ePaasaka Matayo 26.17-19; Mariko 14.12-16
22.7: Olusiku lukulu lw'emigati nzira chachu lwahika. Olo lusiku, y'aBayaahudi balikwaneene kubaaga omwanabuzi gw'ePaasaka.
22.8: Yeesu arhuma Petero na Yohaana ntya: «Muje gurhurheganyiza ebiryo by'ePaasaka, rhuyinje kubisangira.»
22.10: Abashubiza ntya: «Muyunvirize, hanoola muhika omu gishagala, mwashimaana omulume oheekere endaha y'amenji. Mumukulikire omu nju ayinja kuja mo.
22.11: Mwakabwira nyina enju ntya: ‹Mwigiriza abazize mpu ngahe echumbi liri aliira mw'ebiryo by'ePaasaka haguma n'abigirizwa baage.›
22.12: Abayeereka echumbi linene lirheganyizwe omu gorofa, omoola mu mwarheganyiza ebiryo.»
22.13: Bagenda, bashimaana ebintu byooshi kulaala Yeesu ababwiraga. Baaja barheganya ebiryo by'ePaasaka. Ebiryo by'okuyibuka Nnaweerhu Matayo 26.20,26-29; Mariko 14.17,22-25; 1 Bakorinto 11.23-26
22.14: Ebishanji by'okulya byabeere byaahika, Yeesu ayikala kulya haguma n'entumwa zaage.
22.15: Azibwira ntya: «Nachifiijaga bweneene kulya haguma nenyu eyi Paasaka embere ndibuke.
22.16: Kwenge, mbabwirire okuli, ntagachiyirya kugera amango nji yayeenera omu Bwami bwa Nnamahanga.»
22.17: Arhoola engumbu y'edivaayi, akuuza Nnamahanga n'okuderha ntya: «Murhoole eyi ngumbu, ngasi muguma anywe ko.
22.18: Kwenge mbabwirire okuli, ntagachinywa chiro oku divaayi y'omuzabiibu kugera amango Nnamahanga nji ayimanza obwime bwage.»
22.19: Ashuba gurhoola omugati. Abeere amala gukuuza Nnamahanga, agucha mo, abaheereza go n'okuderha ntya: «Oguula guli mubiri gwani, guhaanirwe elugulu wenyu. Mugende mwajira ntya omu kunyibuka.»
22.20: Ko n'oko enyuma z'okulya, arhoola engumbu, aderha ntya: «Eyi ngumbu eri gihango gihyaahya cha Nnamahanga haguma n'abantu baage kulengera eshagama yaani yasheeshekala elugulu wenyu.» Yeesu abala oku bamulenganya Matayo 26.21-25; Mariko 14.18-21
22.21: «Aliko tala k'owampaana ali kulya haguma naani.
22.22: Mwene oMuntu aja gufa nk'oku Nnamahanga arheganyaga. Aliko, buhanya buchi oku muntu wamuhaana!»
22.23: Abigirizwa baava barhondera kubazana nde omu boowe waajira echi chintu. Nde ye mukulu? Matayo 20.24-28; 19.28; Mariko 10.41-45
22.24: Buzinda, haahulukira entonganyi ahagarhi k'abigirizwa ba Yeesu, mpu nde wakaba mukulu ahagarhi kaabo.
22.25: Yeesu abwira bo ntya: «Abaami b'abapagaani banabarhegeka nka baja, n'abagwerhe obuhashe oku bantu bachiyirika ‹banyamenja.›
22.26: Aliko mwabo, birhabaaga ntyo. Ahuubwe, oli mukulu omu mwabo ahinduke nka ye mudoorho, n'orhambwire, abe nka ye mukozi.
22.27: Leero, nde y'eri mukulu oku windi: oyikeere n'okulya changwa oli kumuyuuhulira? K'arhali olaala oyikeere n'okulya? Ahuubwe, nyoono ndi ahagarhi kenyu nka mukozi.
22.28: «Mwewe mwachihangaanire kubeera haguma naani omu bigeregezo byaani.
22.29: Cho girhumire mbarheganyiize obwami nk'oku naani Daarha abunrheganyizaga,
22.30: yi mulya n'okunywa oku meeza maani, omu Bwami bwani. Kandi muyikale oku ntebe z'obwami yi muchiira olushinja emilala ekumi n'ebiri y'eIsraheeli.» Yeesu ashambaala oku Simooni Petero amuhakana Matayo 26.31-35; Mariko 14.27-31; Yohaana 13.37-38
22.31: Yeesu ashuba kuderha ntya: «Simooni, Simooni, Shetaani abahemere oku mugere omu bigeregezo kuguma n'oku bayeera amahemba.
22.32: Aliko nagusaliriire wooyo Simooni, y'obwemeezi bwawe burhaheraga looshi. Na hanoola ongalukira, okomeze beene benyu.»
22.33: Petero amubwira ntya: «Nnaweerhu, nayemereere kugenda naawe nachiro akaba omu munyororo changwa omu lufu.»
22.34: Yeesu amushubiza ntya: «Petero, nkubwirire okuli, embere oluhazi lubike zeene, waaba eyi wamampakana gasharhu oku orhanyinji.» Yeesu abwira abigirizwa bachirheganye
22.35: Yeesu ashuba kubabaza ntya: «Amango nabarhumaga buzira shaho, buzira chigunira n'ebiraato, ka mwalibulire chintu?» Bamushubiza ntya: «Ntaacho.»
22.36: Yeesu ababwira ntya: «Ahuubwe leero, ogwerhe eshaho n'echigunira abirhoole. N'orhagwerhe engoorho aguze efulema yaage y'agula nguma.
22.37: Kwenge mbabwirire okuli, bihemere ebiyandikirwe binjirike ko: ‹Bamuganjire omu bajira amabi.› Leero, ebiyandikirwe elugulu waani bikola kujirika.»
22.38: Abigirizwa bamubwira ntya: «Nnaweerhu, tala ngoorho ebiri.» Naye ababwira ntya: «Mulekere ahoola!» Yeesu asaliira oku musozi gw'eMizeyituuni Matayo 26.36-46; Mariko 14.32-42
22.39: Yeesu arhenga mw'echo gishagala, aja oku musozi gw'eMizeyituuni nka okw'azigaanaga. Abigirizwa baage bamukulikira.
22.40: Agerere ahoola, ababwira ntya: «Musaliire, yi murhaja omu bigeregezo.»
22.41: Ava achikuula haguma nabo, aja oku bule nka ah'omuntu akagala kulekera ebaale, afukama, asaliira Nnamahanga ntya:
22.42: «Daarha, akaba ntya b'obulonza bwawe, ohire hale naani eyi ngumbu y'amalibuko. Aliko, burhabaaga bulonza bwani bo bujirikage, sy'obulonza bwawe.» [
22.43: Ho n'aho, malahika amubonekera gurhenga empingu gushuba kumuheereza emisi.
22.44: Yeesu abeere ababeere bweneene, ashuba gusaliira n'obushiru kulusha. Entuubano yaage yaba nka mirhonyi y'eshagama eri gurhoga oku budaka.]
22.45: Amalire gusaliira, ayimanga n'okuja emunda abigirizwa bali. Ashimaana balyaamire elugulu w'amaganya manene.
22.46: Abaza bo ntya: «Charhumire mwalyaama? Muzuuke munasaliire, yi murhaja omu bigeregezo.» Ogufarhwa kwa Yeesu Matayo 26.47-56; Mariko 14.43-49; Yohaana 18.3-11
22.47: Yeesu abeere achiri aderha, ho n'aho abantu banene baahika. Yuuda, ola muguma w'omu zila ntumwa ekumi n'ebiri, aliiri kulambagira embere zaabo. Ashegera hoofu na Yeesu y'amuhoobera.
22.48: Yeesu amubaza ntya: «Yuuda, omu kumuhoobera mu wamalenganya Mwene oMuntu?»
22.49: Abigirizwa baliiri haguma na Yeesu babeere baabona ebyaja kuba, baamubaza ntya: «Nnaweerhu, ka rhubashogoorhe n'engoorho?»
22.50: Ho n'aho, mwigirizwa muguma ashinjibula ogurhwi kw'emalyo k'omuja w'omudaahwa mukulu.
22.51: Aliko Yeesu aderha ntya: «Lekera aho!» Ava ahuma oku gurhwi k'oyo mulume n'okugufumya.
22.52: Omu bayinjaga gufarha Yeesu mwaliiri abakulu b'abadaahwa, abimangizi b'abalanzi b'eNju ya Nnamahanga n'abashamuka b'aBayaahudi. Yeesu ababwira ntya: «Mwayinjire n'engoorho n'enkoni, owamenya mpu ndi gishumuusi!
22.53: Esiku zooshi, naliiri haguma nenyu omu Nju ya Nnamahanga, murhayinjaga kunfarha. Aliko chinoola gihe gikola chenyu na ech'obuhashe b'omwizimya.» Petero ahakana Yeesu Matayo 26.57–27.1; Mariko 14.53–15.1; Yohaana 18.13-27
22.54: Abo bantu baafarha Yeesu, bamuheeka omu nju y'omudaahwa mukulu. Petero abakulikira buzira kubayegeera.
22.55: Bachaana omuliro ahagarhi k'embuga, bayikala. Petero naye ayikala ahagarhi kaabo.
22.56: Elugulu w'obumoleke b'omuliro, omuja muguma w'omukazi abona Petero ayikeere. Amuloleereza n'okuderha ntya: «Oyuula naye aliiri haguma n'ola muntu.»
22.57: Aliko Petero ahakana, aderha ntya: «Ego mukazi, nyoono ntamuyinji!»
22.58: Hagerere hishanji higeeke, owindi muntu amubona n'okuderha ntya: «Naawe, oli muguma wabo.» Petero naye aderha ntya: «Nangwa maani, ntali muguma wabo!»
22.59: Hagerere nka saa nguma, kandi owindi muntu ayemeereza ntya: «Okuli, oyu mulume aliiri haguma na Yeesu, kwenge naye ali Mugalilaaya.»
22.60: Petero ashubiza ntya: «Muza wee, ntamenyere ebi washonda kuderha!» Ho n'aho, oku achiri aderha, oluhazi lwabika.
22.61: Nnaweerhu ava ahindamuka n'okulola Petero. Petero ayibuka echinwa Nnaweerhu amubwiraga oku: «Embere oluhazi lubike zeene, waaba eyi wamampakana gasharhu.»
22.63: Abantu bali bafarhire Yeesu, baalema bamushuuka n'okumushuurha.
22.64: Baamuhubya ameesho n'okulema bamubwira ntya: «Leeba! Orhubwire nde wamagushuurha!»
22.65: Baashuba kulema bamudukanga ebindi bidusi binene. Yeesu asidaakwa omu kabuga k'aBayaahudi Matayo 26.59-66; Mariko 14.55-64; Yohaana 18.19-24
22.66: Bwabeere bwacha, abashamuka b'aBayaahudi, abakulu b'abadaahwa n'abigiriza b'amarhegeko bachiigusha haguma. Baheeka Yeesu omu kabuga kaabo.
22.67: Bamubwira ntya: «Akaba wooyo we Krisitu, orhubwirage.» Naye abashubiza ntya: «Nkababwira ko murhakayemeera!
22.69: Aliko gurhengera buno, Mwene oMuntu aba ayikeere emalyo ma Nnamahanga w'obuhashe.»
22.70: Booshi baabaza ntya: «Ka gasi wooyo we Mwene Nnamahanga?» Abashubiza ntya: «Mwewe mwe muderhere oku ndi ye.»
22.71: Baava baaderha ntya: «Bwindi buhamiiriza buchi rhulagire ko? Rhwayunviirhe rhwenyine eby'aderhere!»

23.1: Bala bantu booshi babaaga bali omu kabuga k'aBayaahudi bayimanga, baheeka Yeesu embere z'omwimangizi Pilaato.
23.2: Barhondera kumusidaaka, baderha ntya: «Rhwabugaanire oyu muntu ali ararusa olubaga lwerhu; ali abuza guhaana ekooli emwa mwami mukulu Kayizaari, anali achiiderha yenyine oku ali Krisitu, k'okuderha mwami.»
23.3: Pilaato amubaza ntya: «Ka wooyo oli mwami w'aBayaahudi?» Yeesu amushubiza ntya: «Wooyo, we waderhere ntyo.»
23.4: Pilaato abwira abakulu b'abadaahwa n'olubaga lw'abantu ntya: «Ntaacho nabwene emw'oyu muntu chagarhuma ahanwa.»
23.5: Aliko, baharhiiriza n'okuderha ntya: «Enyigirizo zaage yi zaarhuma abantu balwisa abakulu omu Yudeeya yooshi. Arhangiriraga eGalilaaya, leero ali kuno.» Yeesu embere za mwami Heroode
23.6: Pilaato abeere ayunva ebyoola, abaza akaba oyu muntu aliiri Mugalilaaya.
23.7: Abeere amenya oku Yeesu arhengera omu gihugo girhegekerwe na Heroode, amurhuma emwa Heroode, kwenge naye aliiri eYerusaleema mw'ezoola siku.
23.8: Heroode abeere abona Yeesu, ashagaluka bweneene. Gurhengera miira, aliiri ashonda kumubona kwenge abaaga ayunviirhe emyaazi yaage. Na kandi, aliiri alangaalira okubona Yeesu ajira egisomereene.
23.9: Heroode amubaziiriza, aliko Yeesu ntaacho amushubize.
23.10: Abakulu b'abadaahwa n'abigiriza b'amarhegeko baliiri ahoola, bamusidaaka n'obukali bunene.
23.11: Heroode naye, haguma n'abasoda baage, bashekera Yeesu n'okumukena. Bamalire kumushekera n'okumuyambisa omwambalo gukwiriire bweneene, ashuba kugalula Yeesu emwa Pilaato.
23.12: Olo lusiku, Heroode na Pilaato baaba beera, n'obo embere baliiri banzi. Yeesu achiirwa olushinja mpw'afe Matayo 27.11-26; Mariko 15.1-15; Yohaana 18.39–19.16
23.13: Pilaato ahamagaza abakulu b'abadaahwa, abimangizi b'aBayaahudi n'abandi bantu.
23.14: Ababwira ntya: «Mwandeerheraga oyu muntu bulaala mwaderhaga oku aliiri gurarusa olubaga. Namubazize embere zenyu aliko nyoono ntaacho namubwene ko chagarhuma ahanwa omu byooshi mwamusidakiire.
23.15: Heroode naye ntaacho amubwene ko, kwenge arhugaluliire ye. Ntaacho omu by'ajirire chagarhuma ayirhwa.
23.17: Ngasi lusiku lukulu lw'ePaasaka, Pilaato alikwaneene kubalikuulira omuntu muguma oli omu munyororo.]
23.18: Abantu booshi bayaamira chaligumira ntya: «Oyirhe oyu muntu! Orhulikuulire Baraaba!»
23.19: Baraaba abaaga ashwekerwe elugulu w'entambala yabaaga omu gishagala n'okuyirha omuntu.
23.20: Pilaato ashuba kuderha nabo, kwenge alishondere alikuule Yeesu.
23.21: Aliko boowe baalema bayaama ntya: «Omubambe oku musalaaba! Omubambe oku musalaaba!»
23.22: Pilaato ababwira ntya obwa gasharhu: «Bubi buchi ajirire? Ntaacho namubwene ko chagarhuma ayirhwa. Enyuma z'okumushuurha, namulikuula.»
23.23: Aliko bachihanda n'olwamo lunene, omu guhema abambwe oku musalaaba. Olwamo lwabo lunene lwahimana.
23.24: Buzinda, Pilaato arhegeka oku bibe nk'oku abantu baahemaga.
23.25: Alikuula ola bashondaga, wali wahirirwe omu munyororo elugulu w'obugome n'okuyirha omuntu; abaheereza Yeesu, bamujire nk'oku balonzaga. Yeesu abambwa oku musalaaba Matayo 27.31-44; Mariko 15.20-32; Yohaana 19.17-24
23.26: Abasoda b'aBarooma babeere bali baheeka Yeesu emunda bamuyirhira, bashimaanana n'omuntu muguma oyirikwa Simooni, w'egishagala ch'eKureene, waliiri gurhenga omu shwa. Baava bamurhoola n'okumuheesa omusalaaba mpu aguheeke enyuma za Yeesu.
23.27: Olubaga lunene lw'abantu lwali kulikiire Yeesu. Ahagarhi kaabo haliiri abakazi baliiri balira n'oguchiniguula elugulu waage.
23.28: Yeesu abahindamukira n'okubabwira ntya: «Mwe bakazi b'eYerusaleema, murhandiriraga. Aliko muchiilirire n'abaana benyu.
23.29: Kwenge esiku zayinjire abantu nji baderha ntya: ‹Bagishirwe abakazi b'engumba, zigishirwe enda zirhashubiraga kuburha n'amabeere marhashubiraga kuyonsa!›
23.30: Amo mango, abantu nji barhondera okubwira emisozi ntya: ‹Murhurhogere ko!›, n'okubwira orhusozi ntya: ‹Murhuhambe!›
23.31: Bulaala eyi bankajira ebyoola oku murhi mubishi, bichi nji byajirirwa omurhi guyuumire?»
23.32: Kandi, abasoda bali baheekere ebishumuusi bibiri, byaali byaaja kuyirhwa haguma na Yeesu.
23.33: Babeere baagera ahantu hayirikwa Mpanga, bamubambira ahoola oku musalaaba, na bila bishumuusi bibiri, chiguma ekulyo n'echindi ekulembe.
23.34: [Yeesu aderha ntya: «Daarha, obababalire, kwenge barhamenyere echi bali baajira.»] Abasoda bagabaana emyambalo yaage omu kuyeesha esimbi.
23.35: Abantu baliyimangire ahoola, baanali baalola. Abarhegesi b'aBayaahudi boowe, bashinyagulira Yeesu, baderha ntya: «Achungwire abandi; agichungule yenyine, akaba ali Krisitu, ola Nnamahanga agishogere!»
23.36: Abasoda nabo baliiri bamushekera. Bayinja kumuha edivaayi y'enkala,
23.37: n'okumubwira ntya: «Akaba oli mwami w'aBayaahudi, ogifumye wenyine!»
23.38: Haliiri kandi elugulu waage ogu mwandiko: «Oyu ye Mwami w'aBayaahudi.»
23.39: Muguma omu bishumuusi bibambirwe oku musalaaba amudukanga ntya: «K'orhali we Krisitu? Ochifumye wenyine onarhufumye!»
23.40: Aliko echindi gishumuusi chakalihira echaabo ntya: «K'orhagwerhe chiro obuuba bwa Nnamahanga, wooyo weeri waahanwa kuguma naye?
23.41: Oku rhwewe, obuhane burhukwaneene, kwenge rhuli rhwayankirira egikwaneene ebijiro byeerhu. Aliko oyuula nta chibi n'echiguma ajirire.»
23.42: Ashuba kuderha ntya: «Yeesu, onyibuke hano nj'oja omu Bwami bwawe.»
23.43: Yeesu amushubiza ntya: «Okuli, nkubwirire, zeene waaba haguma naani omu Paradizo .» Olufu lwa Yeesu Matayo 27.45-56; Mariko 15.33-41; Yohaana 19.28-30
23.44: Zaali zikola zashonda kuba saa ndarhu; haaba omwizimya oku gihugo chooshi kugera aha saa mwenda,
23.45: kwenge ezuuba lyalihirimire. N'omwenda gw'omu Nju ya Nnamahanga gwachisharhula ahagarhi.
23.46: Yeesu ayaama ntya: «Daarha, mpirire omurhima gwani omu fune zaawe.» Amalire kuderha ebyoola, asimuuka.
23.47: Omukulu w'abasoda abeere abona ebyabeere, akuuza Nnamahanga n'okuderha ntya: «Okuli, oyu muntu aliiri okwaneene!»
23.48: Abantu booshi balichigushire ahoola kulola kw'eyo myaazi, babwene ebyabeere, bagaluka emwabo n'amaganya manene.
23.49: Booshi baliyinji Yeesu, n'abakazi baliiri bamuherekeeze gurhengera eGalilaaya, bayimanga hale, baalola ebiri byaaba. Yeesu ahambwa Matayo 27.57-61; Mariko 15.42-47; Yohaana 19.38-42
23.50: -51 Haliiri mulume muguma oyirikwa Yozefu wahulukiraga eHarimateya, gishagala chiguma ch'aBayaahudi. Aliiri muntu mwinja onakwaneene, anagendaga alinga obwime bwa Nnamahanga. Aliiri muguma w'akabuga k'aBayaahudi, aliko arhaali yemereere omuhigo n'ebijiro byaabo by'okuyirha Yeesu.
23.52: Aja emwa Pilaato, ahema omubiri gwa Yeesu.
23.53: Aguyandagaza oku musalaaba, aguzingira kw'edaraape, aguhira omu shinda yajokolwaga omu baale. Mweyo shinda, mwabaaga murhashubiraga guhaabwa muntu.
23.54: Olo lusiku, lwaliiri lwagarhaano, lo lwanaliiri lusiku l'ogurheganya eSaabato, n'eSaabato yali kola gurhondera.
23.55: Balaala bakazi baliiri barhengeere eGalilaaya haguma na Yeesu, bakulikira Yozefu. Baabona eshinda n'obulyo bahiraga mo omubiri gwa Yeesu.
23.56: Bagaluka gurheganya amavurha n'amarashi. Olusiku lw'eSaabato, bahumuuka, gukulikirana n'eRhegeko lya Nnamahanga.

24.1: Olusiku lwakulikiraga eSaabato, bala bakazi baja ebwa shinda eseeziseezi, eyi baheekere amavurha m'amarashi bali barheganyize.
24.2: Bashimaana ebaale lyalichingire eshinda lyahirikirwe eburhambi.
24.3: Baja mo, aliko barhabonaga omubiri gwa Nnaweerhu Yeesu.
24.4: Babeere bali basoomerwa elugulu w'ebyabeere, ho n'aho balume babiri bayambeere emyambalo ebaraganyize babonekana embere zaabo.
24.5: Aboola bakazi bayuubaha bweneene, bayeerekeza amalanga maabo oku daho. Aliko aboola balume bababwira ntya: «Girhumire mwashondera ozeene omu bafu?
24.6: Arhali hano, afuukire! Muyibuke ebi ababwiraga amango alichiri eGalilaaya oku:
24.7: ‹Bihemere Mwene oMuntu ahaanwe oku banyabyaaha, abambwe oku musalaaba, anafuuke olusiku lwa gasharhu.›»
24.8: Abo bakazi baava bayibuka ebinwa byaage.
24.9: Bagaluka gurhenga ebwa shinda, n'ebyoola byooshi babibalira entumwa ekumi na nguma n'abandi bigirizwa.
24.10: Aboola bakazi babibaliraga entumwa baliiri: Mariya w'eMagadala, Jaani, Mariya nyina wa Yakobo n'abandi baliiri haguma nabo.
24.11: Aliko ebi binwa byabonekana oku meesho m'entumwa nka ntaacho bimalire, barhanabiyemeeraga.
24.12: Aliko Petero yeewe ayimanga, alibirhira ebwa shinda. Ayunamire, abona emyenda alizingirwe mo yonyine. Ava achigalukira emwage, eyi asomereerwe ebyabeere. Yeesu abonekera abigirizwa babiri omu njira ye Emawu Mariko 16.12-13
24.13: Olo lusiku lo n'olo, babiri omu bigirizwa ba Yeesu baliiri baaja omu gishagala chiyirikwa Emawu. Chaliiri oku bilomeetere byakagera kw'ekumi na chiguma n'eYerusaleema.
24.14: Baliiri baganiira oku byooshi byazindaga kugera.
24.15: Babeere bali baganiira n'okubazana, Yeesu yenyine abayegeera n'okugenda haguma nabo.
24.16: Aliko ameesho maabo maalihubizwe yi barhamumenya.
24.17: Yeesu ababaza ntya: «Binwa bichi muli mwaganiira muli kulambagira?» Bayimanga eyi bagwerhe amaganya manene.
24.18: Muguma omu bo, oyirikwa Keleopaasi, amubaza ntya: «Ka wooyo wenyine omu balama eYerusaleema werhamenyere ebyabeere mw'ezi siku?»
24.19: Yeesu naye abaza bo ntya: «Bichi ebyo?» Bamushubiza ntya: «Ebiyerekeere Yeesu w'eNazareeti, ola waliiri muleebi w'obuhashe omu bijiro n'enderho embere za Nnamahanga n'embere z'olubaga looshi.
24.20: Leero, abakulu b'abadaahwa n'abarhegesi beerhu nji bamuhaanire mpu ahanirwe olufu anabambwe oku musalaaba.
24.21: Rhwalinihiire oku yeewe ye wali wachungula Israheeli. Aliko leero haguma n'ebyo byooshi, zeene l'olusiku lwa gasharhu gurhenga ebyo bibeere.
24.22: Aliko kandi, abakazi baguma nabo b'echigusho cheerhu bali barhushalamize. Bali balamukiire zeene eseeziseezi oku shinda,
24.23: aliko barhaali babwene omubiri gwage. Bamaava bayinja kuderha oku babonekeerwe na bamalahika. Abo bamalahika bababwirire oku Yeesu ali mugumaguma.
24.24: Beerhu baguma balijiire oku shinda, banabugaanire ebintu nka okw'abakazi babiderhaga. Aliko yeewe, barhamubwene.»
24.25: Yeesu aja ababwira ntya: «Mwe bihwinja mwe! N'emirhima yenyu erhayemeerera ho byooshi abaleebi baderhaga!
24.26: Ka Krisitu arhaalikwaneene alibuke ntyo y'aja omu bukuuze bwage?»
24.27: Yeesu ava abahuguula oku biri omu Mandiko Matagatiifu mooshi elugulu waage, gurhonderera oku bitaabu bya Muusa n'ebyabaleebi booshi.
24.28: Babeere bayegeera egishagala baliiri baaja mo, Yeesu abonekana nk'owagendeerera n'olugenzi.
24.29: Aliko bamurhebeereza omu kuderha ntya: «Obeere haguma neerhu, kwenge bwayirire.» Ntyo ku Yeesu ajiire omu nju kubeera haguma nabo.
24.30: Abeere ayikala kulya haguma nabo, arhoola omugati n'okugugisha, aguchagulanga n'okuguheereza bo.
24.31: Ameesho maabo maaja mahumuulwa bwinja, baanaja bamumenya. Aliko ahirima embere zaabo.
24.32: Baabazana ntya: «K'emirhima yeerhu erhaliyunviirhe obushagaluke bunene amango aliiri aganiira neerhu omu njira n'ogurhuhuguulira eby'aMandiko Matagatiifu maderhere?»
24.33: Ho n'aho bayuumuka, bagaluka eYerusaleema. Babugaana zilaala ntumwa ekumi na nguma zichigushire haguma n'abandi bigirizwa.
24.34: Abo booshi, babwira bala bigirizwa babiri ntya: «Okuli Nnaweerhu afuukire, anabonekeere Simooni!»
24.35: Bala bigirizwa babiri baabala ebyaali bibahikiire omu njira, na gurhe barhegeeraga Yeesu amango achagulangaga omugati. Yeesu abonekera abigirizwa Yohaana 20.19-23
24.36: Bala bigirizwa babiri babeere bali baderha ebyoola, Yeesu yenyine achiyeerekana ahagarhi kaabo n'okubabwira ntya: «Omurhuula gube haguma nenyu!»
24.37: Abigirizwa baashalama n'okuyuubaha bweneene, eyi bakengereere mpu babwene omuzimu.
24.38: Aliko Yeesu ababwira ntya: «Bichi birhumire mwayuubaha? Bichi birhumire mwaganganwa omu mirhima yenyu?
24.39: Mulole amaboko maani n'amagulu maani, okuli nyoono! Munmamaarhe munaloleereze. Omuzimu arhajira munyofu changwa egufa, nka kunoola mubwene mbigwerhe.»
24.40: Omu kuderha ebyoola, abayeereka amaboko maage n'amagulu maage.
24.41: Abigirizwa basoomerwa n'ogushagaluka bweneene, n'obo babaaga barhaza kuyemeera echi babwene. Yeesu aja ababaza ntya: «Ka mugwerhe hano echintu ch'okulya?»
24.44: Aja ababwira ntya: «Ebiila binababwiraga amango nali nchiri haguma nenyu. Byaalihemere bijirike byooshi byaali biyandikirwe elugulu waani omu Rhegeko lya Muusa, omu bitaabu abaleebi bayandikaga n'omu gitaabu ch'eNanga.»
24.45: Ho n'aho, Yeesu abahunuula obwenge b'okuyunva aMandiko Matagatiifu.
24.46: Ava ababwira ntya: «Biyandikirwe oku Krisitu alibuka, n'oku afuuka omu bafu olusiku lwa gasharhu.
24.47: Kandi, omu ziino lyaage, abantu b'ebihugo byooshi gurhangirira eYerusaleema nji baabalirwa oku baleke ebyaaha byaabo yi bababalirwa.
24.49: Nyoono, nabarhumira echi Daarha alaganyaga. Mwabo, mubeere hanoola Yerusaleema kugera amango mwayankirira obuhashe b'ogurhengera empingu.» Yeesu aheekwa empingu Mariko 16.19; Bijiro 1.4-14
24.50: Yeesu aheeka abigirizwa baage kugera hoofu n'egishagala ch'eBetaniiya. Ayinamula amaboko elugulu, abagisha.
24.51: Abeere ali abagisha, achikuula haguma nabo, aheekwa empingu.
24.52: Abigirizwa boowe, bamalire kumuharamya, bagaluka eYerusaleema n'obushagaluke bunene.
24.53: Ngasi mango, baliiri omu Nju ya Nnamahanga eyi banali bamukuuza.

1.1: Muzigirwa Teofiile, Omu gitaabu girhanzi nayandikaga, naderhere elugulu wa byooshi Yeesu arhonderaga kujira n'okuyigiriza,
1.2: guhika olusiku aheekwaga empingu. Embere aheekwe yo, aheereza eNtumwa zaage abaaga agishogere amarhegeko kugerera Muuka-Mutagatiifu.
1.3: Enyuma z'ogufa kwage, ezo ntumwa z'achiyerekanaga ko kugerera ebimenyeeso binene yi zimenya okw'ali mugumaguma. Aliiri ababonekera omu gihe cha siku makumi mane, eyi ali abayigiriza emyaazi eyerekeere obwime bwa Nnamahanga.
1.4: Lusiku luguma mw'amo mango, Yeesu abeere ali haguma nabo, abarhegeka ntya: «Murharhengaga eYerusaleema, aliko mulingire yo echilagaane cha Daarha nababwiraga.
1.5: Yohaana abatiizaga omu menji, aliko mwabo omu siku zigeeke mwabatiizwa na Muuka-Mutagatiifu.» Yeesu aheekwa empingu
1.6: Amango eNtumwa zalichigushire haguma na Yeesu zamubaza ntya: «Nnaweerhu, ka mu chino gihe y'okola kugalulira aBaisraheeli obwami bwabo?»
1.7: Abashubiza ntya: «Birhabalolere okumenya egihe n'ebishanji Daarha afundikire omu burhegesi bwage yenyine.
1.8: Aliko, mwayankiirira obuhashe hano Muuka-Mutagatiifu ayinja elugulu wenyu, mwanaba bahamiiriza baani eYerusaleema, eYudeeya yooshi n'eSamariya, n'omu gulu lyooshi.»
1.9: Yeesu abeere ayuusa kuderha ebyoola binwa, eyi bachiri bamulola, aheekwa empingu n'egichu chamubisha, barhanachimubonaga ko.
1.10: Babeere bachiri baheneera elugulu eyi ali agenda, ho n'aho balume babiri bayambeere emyambalo myeeru bayimanga embere zaabo.
1.11: Baabaza eNtumwa ntya: «Mwe bantu b'eGalilaaya, girhumire mwabeera ahoola eyi muli mwalola elugulu? Oyu Yeesu wamakuulwa ahagarhi kenyu guheekwa empingu, nj'agaluka nk'oku mwabwene aja yo.» Entumwa zalondoola Matiyaasi gukola ahaali ha Yuuda Matayo 10.2-4.; Mariko 3.16-19.; Luuka 6.13-16
1.12: Enyuma z'aho, eNtumwa zagaluka eYerusaleema gurhengera oku musozi gw'eMizeyituuni. Ogo musozi guba hoofu n'eYerusaleema, lugenzi luyemereerwe kulambagirwa olusiku lw'eSaabato.
1.13: Babeere bagaluka omu gishagala, bazamuukira omu gorofa ebusiika. Omoola mu bagendaga babeera. Mwaliiri Petero, Yohaana, Yakobo na Ndereya, Firipo na Tomaasi, Baritolomaayo na Matayo, Yakobo mugala wa Lufaayo, Simooni w'omu chigusho ch'aBazelooti na Yuuda mugala wa Yakobo.
1.14: Abaala booshi bagendaga basaliira n'omurhima muguma, haguma na Mariya nyina wa Yeesu, n'abandi bakazi, na beene baabo Yeesu.
1.15: Lusiku luguma, oluganjo lw'abemeezi balichigushire lwaliiri hoofu egana na makumyaabiri. Petero ayimanga ahagarhi kaabo n'okuderha ntya:
1.16: «Beene beerhu, byaalihemere aMandiko mayeenere, mala Muuka-Mutagatiifu abaaga aderhere kugerera obuunu bwa Daawudi elugulu wa Yuuda. Oyuula Yuuda yi walongoolaga abafarhaga Yeesu.
1.17: Aliiri muguma omu rhwewe, analigwerhe echigabi oku kaasi keerhu.»
1.18: Enyuma z'okugula eshwa n'efuranga z'obuhemusi, arhoga buchuli, enda yaage yabereka n'amala maage masheeshekalira ahashi.
1.19: Abantu booshi b'eYerusaleema bamenya ogo mwazi, oku bulyo elyo shwa lyayirikwa omu lulimi lwaabo mpu lyo «Hakeledama» , kw'okuderha «Eshwa ly'eshagama.»
1.20: «Kwenge biyandikirwe ntya omu gitaabu ch'eNanga: ‹Enju yaage ebe mushaka, na nta muntu oyilamage mo! N'owundi arhoole akaasi kaage! ›»
1.21: -22 «Bihemere leero, rhugishoge owindi muntu muguma w'ogurhoola akaasi kaage. Oyu muntu abe muguma w'omu bala bagendaga barhuherekeza ngasi bishanji byooshi Nnaweerhu Yeesu aliiri abalama haguma neerhu. Aba bantu baliiri haguma neerhu gurhengera amango Yohaana abatiizaga Nnaweerhu guhika olusiku aheekwaga gurhenga ahagarhi keerhu. Bihemere oyu muntu rhwachishoga abe haguma neerhu omu guhamiiriza obufuuke bwa Nnaweerhu.»
1.23: eNtumwa zaaja zamoleka bantu babiri: Yozefu oyirikwa Barisaba wanashembulwaga Yusto, na Matiyaasi.
1.24: Baaja basaliira ntya: «Nnaweerhu, weyinji emirhima y'abantu booshi, oyeerekane nde ochishogere mw'abaala babiri,
